campaignTrail_temp.questions_json = [ { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1300, "fields": { "priority": 1, "description": "\"Jesus, Bernie… We really did ourselves in with this one. This has never been seen before, they're saying- we won't get jack shit done if you don't help me. We just need… something to agree on, God, please. If WE don't get to moving soon, the deep state- the establishment, the pundits, Hillary, they'll bite. We have to find somewhere to start.\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 79072, "fields": { "description": " “Bernie- you and I both know, very well, this will not be fun, but we need to work on our great, strong cabinet. This may very well be, quite possibly, the worst cabinet of all time, but we have to agree somewhere. Neither of us may get what we want-- your socialists sure as hell won't get through and they're saying the RINOs in congress hate me too much- they really do, to bring in most of my picks. The pussies on the senate floor, the chumps, may hate it, but I sketched up a wonderful list of patriots I think I can push in-- no matter what the fake news says.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1301, "fields": { "priority": 2, "description": "\"We need to figure out a solution to our justice crisis. Donald- listen, we need a justice we can get behind, both Democrats and Republicans, otherwise we are completely screwed electorally. We need someone as a compromise candidate - someone who can unify the Senate. Please, just uh, take it into consideration, will you? Otherwise, well uhm, we’ll be losing ground before we even get started.\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1304, "fields": { "priority": 3, "description": "\"Bernie- If there's one thing we can get a unified message on, its trade, and fair trade at that. We have to protect our big and beautiful blue-collar workers from the exploitations of foreign companies and build back in America through whatever means necessary. Quite frankly, it's very sad to see both Democrats and Republicans SELL OUT OUR COUNTRY. It ends NOW!\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1302, "fields": { "priority": 3, "description": "\"We need legitimacy - our administration, it’s lacking credibility. Maybe a state visit would help? We need everything we can get Donald, for this country. Our citizens will always come first, our underlying message, but we seriously need some recognition from our international partners. Where do we go?\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1305, "fields": { "priority": 3, "description": "\"We have to build the wall Bernie, we have to, otherwise we won't have a country anymore. You and I both realise the UNIPARTY of ELITES are exporting cheap labour to this country. WORKERS FIRST, AMERICA FIRST. We need some serious thought into my proposal Bernard, otherwise, well, they'll come for us both! MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN!\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1303, "fields": { "priority": 3, "description": "\"Mr President - You & I need to do some serious manoeuvres in regards to our nation's health. America cannot continue to go down this path of decadence. For too long, Americans are paying higher and higher prices for fewer and fewer treatments. We need to act in the nation's interest. We need Medicare to be a universal right. You said so yourself that you agreed with the principle 20 years ago. It's the right thing to do, Donald.\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1325, "fields": { "priority": 4, "description": "\"The Middle East - NOT MY CONCERN! But, these hawks, they say, 'Oh Mr President, we need to act!', well they can SHOVE it! We need to take a drastic turn, otherwise, the corrupt MILITARY INDUSTRIAL COMPLEX, who exploit our country, will come after the US soon. We need a deal with those 'shithole countries' NOW. Get Netanyahu on the phone.\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1306, "fields": { "priority": 4, "description": "\"Mr. President, we need to keep our spending under control radically. We're in tens of trillions of dollars in debt, we're being outsourced by our competitors, and money is drying up. We need a win, Mr. President. May I suggest, uh, looking at defense spending? We have homeless people, our uh, finest, being tarnished while we waste money on sending money to arms contractors. It needs to end.\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1309, "fields": { "priority": 4, "description": "\"We love our workers, We truly do, Me and you Bernie, we have a connection with them. A real one. These phony politicians are SLIME BALLS when it comes to giving our workers the best they need. INCOMPETENT! Did you hear they're striking recently? It's absolutely shocking what these companies do to our country, shameful even! We need to act NOW.\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1307, "fields": { "priority": 5, "description": "\"We need to get out there and talk to people, Mr President. They haven't seen either me or you down there for a long, long time. We're so bogged down, we need time aside to get a rally together. Up to you if you want to do a bi-partisan rally with both of us there or not, up to you. But I think it would be good for the base. Consider it.\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1317, "fields": { "priority": 5, "description": "\"Bernard - listen, we need to discuss our party affiliations NOW. You're basically a registered Democrat, and I'm a registered Republican. Listen, I very much doubt we will get either of our parties' nominations, but we should, at the very least, TRY. A tough pill to swallow, but very much a NECESSARY one!\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1308, "fields": { "priority": 5, "description": "\"Ok, Donald, the midterms are coming up soon. We need to make some endorsements. We both have our own wants, but we have tried to work together so far. We need to come up with a plan for how to continue to get a mix of our agendas passed. Who were you thinking?\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1319, "fields": { "priority": 6, "description": "\"Bernard, listen, I won't say it again. We need Tax Reform, and BADLY! This country is going down the drain without tax cuts. You and I, maybe not so different when it comes to the UPPER CLASSES hogging it all! Our working class, who we love so much, are being SWAMPED with regulation and HIGH tax. It needs to end NOW.\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1318, "fields": { "priority": 7, "description": "\"I love all Americans, regardless of race, creed or religion, however some want to silence American voices. Those in the south. We need to focus on redistricting, and hopefully push more people into fair and honest seats. So please, Donald, we must FIX THIS, all who don’t support this are just cogs of the machine.\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1316, "fields": { "priority": 7, "description": "\"Mr President, the NATO Summit is about to commence in the United Kingdom, and we need to shore up our alliance across Europe if we are to still have hard power on the continent. While I am in favour of NATO and our continental allies, we need a new approach. We cannot be the piggybank anymore.\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1320, "fields": { "priority": 8, "description": "The opponent and their VP are revealed", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1315, "fields": { "priority": 8, "description": " \"Donald, intelligence reports suggest a new virus has come out of China, called COVID-19. I'm very worried about this development Mr President, we need to uh, act quickly, before it spreads of course. The country needs leadership now.\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 4167, "fields": { "priority": 8, "description": "Opponent Q1", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1323, "fields": { "priority": -2, "description": "“We have a great convention, one of the best, maybe EVER! Listen, we need someone to do a prime time speaking slot, for us, and for the people, because frankly our movement isn't about us, it's about the people. Bernard, who would you recommend? We need STRONG CREDENTIALS!”", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1321, "fields": { "priority": 9, "description": " \"BLM is a disgrace! They loot our towns, our cities, all in the name of 'so-called' JUSTICE of George Floyd. It's madness Bernard, complete MADNESS. We need to reassert control. You need to get these people under authority Bernie, I mean, these people will hear your every word. STOP THE VIOLENCE! We need PEACE.\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1322, "fields": { "priority": 9, "description": "Donald, Bernie, we need you both to campaign. Hard. This is a battle for the future of populism in this country, and you are our champions. We need your expertise and your charisma out there. Please, for the future of our movement. Campaign like hell!", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 6741, "fields": { "priority": 9, "description": "Opponent Q2", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 78656, "fields": { "priority": 9, "description": "opponent's VP Q", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1311, "fields": { "priority": 10, "description": "\"We need to act decisive when it comes to providing relief for families Mr President. People are losing hope, but not only hope, but their jobs, their livelihoods, their families. We need to act, we need to provide relief Donald, otherwise, well, we'll go down as heartless and crooked people.\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1313, "fields": { "priority": 10, "description": "Ruth Bader Ginsburg, a Supreme Court Justice, has passed away. Do you have any comments, Mr. President? ", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1312, "fields": { "priority": 10, "description": "'BERNIE! You have to impress the audience today. It is VITAL that this happens, otherwise, well, it might be doomed. OUR PEOPLE NEED US! I shall be going to one myself as well. WE HAVE TO defeat these CRONIES. We need a HUGE win. Make it happen.\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1314, "fields": { "priority": 10, "description": "\"Donald, are you okay? You don't seem very well, like at all. Maybe you should go to the Walter Reed, you need your check-up. I'll look after the place while you're gone. Godspeed.\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 37589, "fields": { "priority": 10, "description": "“Donald, you have your debate coming up, you need to win it, you need to turn the tables. Our country is going through something unimaginable, and we're leading the ship. We need to steer it, and steer it now. We have to win.”", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 1324, "fields": { "priority": -1, "description": "\"Okay, Donald, we're in the final stretch of the campaign. Let's hit the road, talk to people, rally, campaign, whatever we can do, we need to do it. Where should we go?\"", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 42532, "fields": { "priority": 0, "description": "Donald Trump, 45th President of the United States, is dead. Sources tell us he succumbed to COVID-19. May he Rest in Peace.", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 67678, "fields": { "priority": 0, "description": "“Listen, Donald, uh, Senator King, I know him pretty well. He's a “moderate”, y'know Lieberman type, a so-called maverick. Uh, if they want to make this a “unity” ticket, they aren't doing many, uh, favours for the Democrats. This could be huge for us, and a much needed break from the media onslaught.”", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 79670, "fields": { "description": "\"These idiots, the UNIPARTY strikes again. Who did they go with again? Some NOBODY from Maine, complete and total SUCKER, thinks he can take OUR style! Angus King, So called 'INDEPENDENT'. And what? Who's with him? Mitt Romney? That Mormon LOSER? This is going to be a piece of cake Bernard, trust me!\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 79778, "fields": { "description": " “It’s, uh, quite clear at this point Donald, that the powers that be in both parties are opposed to the work we’re doing, to fight income and wealth inequality. The billionaire class –Uh, no offense intended, of course– doesn’t want to give up its piece of the pie, and they nominated one of their own to take it back. I don’t know the whole New York social… thing, but I’m assuming you have some relationship with Bloomberg? And his VP John Kasich, you know him from the 2016 primary?”\n" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 71452, "fields": { "priority": 10, "description": "“Donald, we need to install calmness and stability. I’ts getting dangerously out of control, I mean, you’re the President, you and I need to do more. Talk isn’t enough. We need action, and we need it now. What should we do?”", "likelihood": 1 } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80043, "fields": { "description": "\"Mr President - the Democrats and Republicans...they’re completely disunited, they can’t stand each other. They’ve got, uh, what’s his name? Pete Buttigieg? And Mr Bel Edwards? Republicans aren’t doing well either, with Haley and Kemp. What should we do, Mr President?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80053, "fields": { "description": " “These frauds, complete and total whackjobs, they had one job, and they couldn’t even do it! They’re so disunited. Phil Scott, total RINO, with Baker? They have no idea what they're doing. It gets better Bernard, I mean, Hillary is up for seconds, SO SOON? Cory is salivating at the chance for more power. What a freak.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80070, "fields": { "description": "\"Angus- he's trying to steal our thunder Donald, trying to be an 'anti-establishment' figure against us. Surely, y'know, he's not serious, is he? We need to act now before this gets out of hand, quickly.\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80100, "fields": { "description": " \"Bernard, listen, Romney is a sore loser. Why has he come back CRYING 8 years later? Pathetic fool. Crush him, Bernie, just like Obama sadly did. No one wanted him to be President, AND NOW he wants to be VP? No way in HELL!\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80109, "fields": { "description": "“Well, Donald, they’ve completely lost all hope. Mr Bloomberg, I mean, a rich billionaire with no connection to the people, no offense of course. I don’t think he can tap into what we can, we need to hit him hard. What do you think?\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80118, "fields": { "description": "“With the campaign picking up more steam, we need to go on the offensive. Our position is fragile at best Donald, and Bloomberg is only going to uh, capitalize on that with his ‘dark money’. We need to figure out a plan, and fast.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80127, "fields": { "description": "“Listen, Bernard, this guy, I mean, I faced him back in 2016. He’s a total light-weight, has no idea what he’s doing, but most of all, he’s really boring. I almost fell asleep on that stage with him and Little Marco. What a sad pair. Just trounce him, and quickly.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80136, "fields": { "description": " \"Pete who? You've got this Donald, he's a nobody according to you. I'd say maybe be a bit more cautious, but that's just my advice. What should we do against him?\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80145, "fields": { "description": "\"We need to set the narrative, Donald. We can't let Haley or Kemp set one, otherwise we're toast. They're out to stop our movement. We're gonna need to fight with everything we can muster.\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80154, "fields": { "description": "“Bernard, this should be straightforward. Edwards is a complete sleazebag, and Kemp? What a total wimp. These people, our people, they know the truth, in fact, everyone knows it, some are just blind to it! Just sort it out, and we’ll win this without breaking a sweat, okay?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80164, "fields": { "description": " “Mr President, Mrs Clinton is a force to be, well, reckoned with. I fought her in the primaries, and you fought her 4 years ago, we both know how vicious she can be. We need to be resolute and determined to win, what should our strategy be?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80173, "fields": { "description": "\"I'm getting increasingly concerned about Scott and his lackeys. We need to figure something out before we head into electoral disaster, Donald. Let me focus on Baker, you need to think of something for Scott that'll stick.\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80182, "fields": { "description": "\"These guys are total LOSERS. Very much like frauds. So called 'REPUBLICAN' in such a BLEEDING LIBERAL state and an Establishment Democrat with NO real world experience. Unbelievable. Bernard, you know a thing or two about DESTROYING these losers. Teach him a lesson about messing with populism!\"\n" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80191, "fields": { "description": "“Bernie, I've got the greatest idea, maybe the best ever. Have you ever heard of the Joe Rogan Podcast? We need to get on there, really. Face the facts, the American people- the *patriots*, don't know what this administration means, they're scared. Joe's audience are FREE THINKERS, quite frankly- They'd be much kinder to you than they would to crooked Hilary or Barry Hussein. If we want to tell people how I'm- *we're* gonna drain the swamp, we need to go on there, believe me Bernie.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80199, "fields": { "description": "“We have a bit of a break right now, we should do rounds with the media. I have an idea, why don’t you go on a ‘typically bias’ news show, maybe MSNBC? Maybe with some of the recent shifts in this administration, Rachel Maddow will be more lenient. It’s worth a try.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80208, "fields": { "description": "\"Listen, Bern- you're never gonna believe this. It's a fantastic idea, really. I was talking to Tucker- You know him? Fox News. Sure, they're just as fake as CNN half the time, but Tucker... he's a good one, y'know? He wants to interview you. Totally bipartisan, this'll really help show all the old people, in the suburbs- *Normal people- that you're not some kind of Communist, like Obama.\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80217, "fields": { "description": "“This coalition isn't working at all Mr President. Your morals, they’re uh, all over the place. You stand for the rich whilst our ‘base’ is made up of the 99%. I can’t, uh, in good conscience, support your administration any longer. Your no hero Donald, face it, you're just another part of the machine, one just too narcissistic to say otherwise.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80222, "fields": { "description": "Bernie, with you dominating the field against the other primary opponents and coming out with a resounding lead, you are certain to win the Democratic nomination for President. With that in mind, you will need a Vice President. Who do you wish to go with?\n" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80231, "fields": { "description": "\"Oh god, oh dear god. That bastard went out and did it, with the BLM riots in Minneapolis after Floyd’s death, the President himself went on down to Minnesota and deployed the national guard, without even saying a word to you, it’s madness there, utter madness, the city is aflame whilst he goes on out screaming about how the BLM are terrorists like the whiny bitch he is, you need to respond to this, and fast.\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80232, "fields": { "description": "\"They uh, Donald, he deployed the Armed For- I mean, excuse me, the National Guard to Minnesota. Bernie, this is uh, an attack on our democracy, our rights, I mean, c’mon man. We need to send a clear message, about how disgusting this is. He has the morals of an alley cat!\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80233, "fields": { "description": "\"What’s going on? He’s sent in the National Guard? We need to respond quickly to this Vice President. This could spell disaster for the both of us, the President is using force on Americans. It’s a disgraceful act, he should be impeached for all I care.\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80234, "fields": { "description": "“Minnesota, I- I don’t have any words. What’s going on, with Trump to the National Guard, it’s worrying. We need to get a handle on the situation, right now. This is my own home state. We need to fight back against Trump. Now.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80259, "fields": { "description": "\"You may loathe the DNC from its subversion that they applied back in 2016, but you’re a new man Bernie, a person who has seen the horrors of Trump’s administration, and witnessing that has only strengthened your resolve against him and his oligarchs. It’s time to walk on back to the DNC who by far and large went with you, and with slots to give, the question is who to give them to, whether it be an ally or an enemy, those slots have to be filled.\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80260, "fields": { "description": "\"Hey man, we gotta, uh, plan the convention, it’s vital we get it right, y’know? Me and Barack had it easy back then, but with Trump and his attack on us, we need to- to bring it back. Who do we go for Bernie, I uh, suggest someone calm and collected…”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80261, "fields": { "description": "“We got to get ahead of the curve before Trump and his lackeys try and control the narrative. It’s crucial we get someone who’s got the connections and charisma to charm the DNC. Who do you think should get the prime-time slot? Any suggestions?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80262, "fields": { "description": " “Let’s set out a clear and coherent position on everything. The DNC can help us massively with this. The direction is yours, you won fair and square. Who should be the primary speaker? We’ve certainly got some new stars within the party, or we could potentially play it safe. Your call.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80295, "fields": { "description": "“Bernie, we need to hit The Campaign Trail, otherwise we’ll be out of luck and you’ll be packing bags outside the Naval Observatory. We can’t remain idle against someone who wants us gone. Where should we go?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80296, "fields": { "description": "“Heh, y’know back when I was Vice President, I uh- nevermind. Listen, we need to get out there and talk to folks in need. I’ve done it countless times, and uh, people loved it. Just tell me where to go and I’ll go, it’ll be just like my old campaign days.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80297, "fields": { "description": " “We have to do campaign events and get our names out there, I know I’m not nationally known, so maybe a few rallies might help. It’ll definitely boost you as well, it’s a win-win. Any ideas?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80298, "fields": { "description": "“We have to secure our chances at regaining Congress and the White House. The map needs expanding, where should we direct our resources? I know where I’m useful, the Midwest, but I’m happy to go anywhere.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80299, "fields": { "description": " “Let’s face it, if we want to compete with Trump and his oligarch machine, we need to find a proper way to fund the campaign, or we will be as good as gone from this race, we can’t be outspent, otherwise they’ll have the narrative. Bernie, we need to find the angle for funding.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80335, "fields": { "description": "“Bernard, listen, we need to uh…get some donors. We’re being outspent ten to one, I uh, back in the day- speeches used to do the trick, heh, but people are wiser now, I mean- oh, nevermind, uh, but we need to find the money somewhere.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80336, "fields": { "description": " “We have to confront the situation on the ground. We’re being absolutely whalloped out there. I have an idea. Let me talk to donors and see if we can get our footing back on track. It’s the only way.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80337, "fields": { "description": " “Trump has us outfunded and outmatched at every corner. Every lawn I see is full of Trump signs, with slogans of ‘Making America Great Again’. We need to figure out what to do to combat this. What do you suggest?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80707, "fields": { "description": " “I- I have no words. It really happened. The President left the people to cut out and dry with his Covid relief bill, by not giving any relief, it’s more a bill to make it seem like he’s doing something, we’ve seen it all. He’s lambasting you, of all people, on this? We need to hit back, hard. What a sham.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80727, "fields": { "description": "“Listen, y’know, when I was in the Senate, we used to be pretty bi-partisan…anyways, we need to uh, hit on Trump hard, he’s letting families down with COVID relief. He’s always been a con-artist, a threat to democracy. It has to, uh, end. We gotta take the fight to him.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80747, "fields": { "description": "“I’ve tried my best within the Senate to try and get COVID relief through, but Trump and the MAGA Republicans are making it extremely difficult. We need to focus on how he’s destroying American livelihoods. Your call on how to approach this, Bernie.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80767, "fields": { "description": "“I’ve been working with Warren and Mastro, we’ve had a bill for months, but Trump is blocking it, citing federal overreach. We need to use everything against him, do you have any suggestions Vice President? We need to hammer home this point, it’s his Achilles Heel.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80787, "fields": { "description": "Ruth Bader Ginsburg has died. Ruth Bader Ginsburg has passed away. Do you have any comments, Mr. President?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80791, "fields": { "description": "There are years where decades happen, this is one of those years. The end of the tunnel is near Bernard. The debates are right on your door, and it is time to suit up and power through. This is the battle for the soul of this very nation." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80804, "fields": { "description": "“Bernie, I’m going to be honest with you, you’re an old man. You’re nearing 80, and most people doubt that you would be mentally competent to run the nation, and Trump is 5 years younger than you, which doesn’t look good. Let’s show that you’re capable and ready. I believe in you.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80829, "fields": { "description": "“I have, uh, no quarrel with you being old, heck, so am I, but people, y’know, they uh- they wanna make it an issue. We gotta dispel em, put it away nice and tidy. We cannot let the soul of the nation to go to hell because we’re old!”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80854, "fields": { "description": "“People have been making…comments regarding your age. Me personally? It doesn’t bother me, but the Republicans are using it as an attack line. We need to fight against these rumours and prove you’re fit to serve.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80879, "fields": { "description": " “The media are speculating again, this time regarding your health. Listen, Bernie, I know you’re fit for the Presidency, but ordinary Americans have their doubts. We need to confront it head on. Maybe more rallies might do the trick.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80904, "fields": { "description": " “With the campaign ramping up with Trump’s response to COVID-19 and the recent social unrest within America, we need to keep our momentum going, otherwise we’ll face four more years of Trump. We need to pick up some vital endorsements, I’d suggest reaching out to everyone, we need people to join our campaign from all walks of life.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80935, "fields": { "description": "“Bernie, I, uh- we need to get people on our side, man. I know a lot of people down in D.C, who’d be willing to uh, help us out. Just say the word and I’ll get in contact. We need to bring Democrats together.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80964, "fields": { "description": "“We have to bring together our coalition. An endorsement from senior figures from organisations can give us a big boost. I’d personally suggest any affiliated Democratic organisations, but if we wish to broaden our appeal we should look elsewhere. What do you think?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 80993, "fields": { "description": "“Let’s branch out. This isn’t just your mission. It’s their mission as well. The people’s mission, and they need us to carry the torch for them. Let’s focus on endorsements, which we seem to be lacking. I’ll phone in some Midwestern folks, while you focus elsewhere.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81022, "fields": { "description": "“We need to shake up this way in whatever way we can. Listen, this is a big ask, and I can understand if you don’t want to, but you could pledge to serve as a one term President. It might be a game-changer for the moderates.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81031, "fields": { "description": "“Listen, Bernie, we are uh, y’know, pretty old folks, and people notice that. This is my last rodeo, I can’t see myself- anyways, maybe you could do the same? It’d help with uh, the American people. They want honesty, and we can give that to them. Democracy is at stake.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81040, "fields": { "description": "“I’ve been doing some groundwork, and many people have been commenting on your age. It’s quite worrying. Maybe a one-term presidential pledge could help relieve any fears from this? Obviously, it’s up to you, but we need to figure something out.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81049, "fields": { "description": "“Mr Vice President, many senior Democrats have been coming to me regarding your age and your health, and they want you to make a pledge. I understand your frustrations with the DNC, but maybe a one-term pledge for President can alleviate those frustrations?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81058, "fields": { "description": "“Bernie, let’s be totally honest. You're quite…lackluster in foreign policy, to say the least. Obviously, you’re better than Donald Trump, but voters think he has the upper hand. An opportunity has opened itself, with the campaign stabilizing, I think you can afford one trip aboard. Where do you think it’ll matter most?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81075, "fields": { "description": "“We need to get a uh, concen- I mean, excuse me, cohesive foreign policy. Trump is trying to outmatch us, but we can fight back. I have decades of experience, but y’know, you should go on a foreign trip. Let me handle campaignin’! I’d, uh, personally go to Ireland, but it’s up to you man!”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81092, "fields": { "description": " “I believe we need to go on a foreign trip. Our foreign policy credentials aren’t exactly up to standards, and we need everything down to the point in order to defeat Donald Trump. Where should our first foreign visit be during the campaign?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81109, "fields": { "description": "“I’m not exactly immersed within foreign policy, but even I can see we need a gamechanger. I’ll stay here, organising rallies in America. You should go abroad, try and build relationships with foreign leaders. It might help you boost your profile with the more foreign-policy oriented voters.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81126, "fields": { "description": "“It seems like Trump’s open rallies have caught up to him, with his Hurbris ‘killing the giant’. With the President away from the campaign trail, we need a response to this. Covid is no joke, especially with it ravaging America and her families. I talk to people every day, and they worry Bernie- about safety." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81141, "fields": { "description": "“I’m worried about, uh, what’s happening in this country. Donald Trump is away from the campaign, but he’s, y’know, using social media. We need to respond to this, his Covid status. It’s deeply troubling Bernie. You could be, uh, next in line, it’s no joke man, you could be in serious danger." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81154, "fields": { "description": " “It’s worrying. Donald Trump got Covid, and now we’re in a precarious situation. We need to make sure that everyone remains calm. You’re the next in line, remember that. You can use your influence for the better. Let’s bring home stability and peace.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81167, "fields": { "description": "“Bernie, you need to practice social distancing from the President. I know you have daily Covid meetings, but he has it now, and we both know how bad it is for our elderly. Now is the time for urgent action and a sense of order. Hone in what people want to hear.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81180, "fields": { "description": "With the campaign finally coming to an end, we need to figure out our last destination. It’s been a long journey, and a tough one, but we’ve managed to pull through at this moment. We’ve been all across America, honing in on our strengths, now it’s time to put it to good use in the final few days. Where do you want us to go?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81223, "fields": { "description": " “Oh dear God…the 45th President of the United States of America has died. You now have the Presidency Bernie, and with it, enormous power. The nation is in mourning, and you need to guide them through it. It’ll be tough, and I know you had a working relationship with him. I’m sorry. Let’s hope America can come together now, more than ever.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81227, "fields": { "description": " “Mr President, the Republican primaries are getting increasingly crowded, especially since the so-called ‘National Divorce’ just took place. They’re saying you’re cowering to the far-left. How do you wish to combat this?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81241, "fields": { "description": "“They love you, Donald, you’re the hero Republicans need. So much so that when you officially announced re-election under the Republicans, they didn’t put up a fight! Now that you don’t have to deal with Bernie Sanders anymore, who do you want with you to enter the Naval Observatory? We need winners, not losers.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81258, "fields": { "description": "“We all know you have your pockets full of funding, but you know that Bernie is really picking up steam, grassroots and shit you know? So if we want to keep the swings states down our line, then we need to have a considerable spending advantage, but, knowing you, there’s always a way.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81274, "fields": { "description": "“Bernie has the upper hand when it comes to those small dollar donations, but we can always up the game. People yearn for merchandise. MAGA has already taken off, and we can do better. Let me contact some high-profilers, while you can do what you feel like. We have this under control, Mr President.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81290, "fields": { "description": " “Mr President, respectfully, we need to up the stakes. Bernie Sanders has us outmatched in terms of funds, and we need to break equal to try and resonate with America. Thank the Lord for Citizens United. We need to bring together people from all walks of life.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81306, "fields": { "description": "“We need to raise the money from somewhere Mr Trump. Listen, if we’re left out to dry, state and local races are doomed with us. We need to figure out a way on how to bring the balance of power back to us. Anything to shake up this race.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81322, "fields": { "description": "“Listen, Mr President, we need to act decisively on Black Lives Matter. They terrorise our cities and plague our nation with anti-white sentiment. We need to be aggressive in countering home-grown terrorism. How should we proceed?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81340, "fields": { "description": "“Okay, well, Black Lives Matter is becoming a prominent issue again. Mr President, we need to contain and control the situation before it gets out of hand. We need to set a clear, and coherent agenda. What do you think?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81357, "fields": { "description": "“Donald, Black Lives Matter is rampaging through Texas and we need to act now. They don’t realise that we have the power to disperse. Listen, you need to push the button, before our nation falls at the hand of the radicals.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81374, "fields": { "description": "“Black Lives Matter is becoming a serious concern for us and this country. We need to find a way forward. Maybe we can talk to them, see what’s wrong, and how we can improve. It’s the GOP way.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81391, "fields": { "description": "“Mr Trump, your people, they need to hear you. The RNC is vital for our internal success. We need to find someone suitable and palatable for our MAGA agenda. I think that whoever you choose for the prime-time speech will be a great hit. I believe in your judgement, Mr President.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81414, "fields": { "description": "“We have to face the reality of the situation. We’re set to lose, but we can turn it around. Look around you, you have plenty of surrogates who will cheer on your accomplishments…hopefully omitting that communist. We’re going to take the RNC by storm.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81437, "fields": { "description": "“I remember four years ago at the RNC…how times have changed. I, well, made some judgements, but I was wrong, I think. Anyways- we’ve got this one coming up, and we need a real game changer. Something to boost the morale of our fellow GOP members. Let’s get to work and find someone suitable.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81460, "fields": { "description": "“Listen, you might find me to be a…’RINO’, but we need to make a good impression on the Grand Old Party. For too long, we’ve been pushed back further and further, but we should draw the line here and now. We need to find a real person who can bring our party together. Who should it be?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81483, "fields": { "description": "“Donald, we need to campaign vigorously if we are to get another term for you. The Democrats will try everything from within the deep state. They’re frauds, liars and cheats. We need to FIGHT BACK. They won’t know what hit em, Mr President. I’ll go anywhere with you, just tell me where to go.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81505, "fields": { "description": "“We’re going to be in serious trouble if we don’t campaign across the swing states. Your approvals are going upwards, that’s true, but we need to legitimise ourselves, I mean, half the population think you’re a Russian puppet. We need to change that. Where should we go?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81527, "fields": { "description": " “Mr President, we need to act fast. The Democrats and their machine are going out there- they’re hitting it hard. We need to hit back bigger, better and stronger. It’s the Texan way! You and I have some spare time on our hands - why don’t we show a bit of unity for our Republican folks?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81549, "fields": { "description": "“People know our disagreements. That’s true. How about we go out together and campaign? Maybe downplay it, and show some good unity for the Republicans. People are lacking faith, and we can bring it back.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81571, "fields": { "description": "“We need a comprehensive plan when it comes to COVID-19. The American people deserve to know the truth. We know it came from China, and we know the CCP had something to do with it. However, we need to focus domestically, and honestly we should follow the CDC. It’s up to your discretion, of course.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81588, "fields": { "description": "“We have to calm everyone down. This virus is blowing up in our faces, and we have little to no preparation ahead for the future. That’s what this is about. The future. We need to figure out a way forward. We can’t let them get ahead of us, otherwise our electoral chances are doomed.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81605, "fields": { "description": "“COVID is becoming a major problem, Mr President. We need to act quickly. We can’t be relaxed about this, otherwise, well, your approvals, will tank. We have to think of a strategy, a national strategy, to curb this disease. Maybe a talk with Fauci could help?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81622, "fields": { "description": "“It is becoming increasingly obvious COVID-19 is here to stay. That is worrying. We need to mend bridges with the other side and be bi-partisan, or else we’ll face destruction in the ballot box. Let me reach out to moderate Democrats, in the mean time, what do you want to focus on?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81639, "fields": { "description": "\"Bernard - listen, we need to discuss our party affiliations NOW. You're basically a registered Democrat, and I'm a registered Republican. Listen, I very much doubt we will get either of our parties' nominations, but we should, at the very least, TRY. A tough pill to swallow, but very much a NECESSARY one!\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81690, "fields": { "description": "This isn’t the biggest issue facing you right now, but we could focus on switching home states. We could try to appeal to more swing states, and perhaps it can help swing it within our favour. If you were to switch, where?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81701, "fields": { "description": "“We need to go on the assault. For too long, we’ve played nice with Democratic politicians, but that ends today. We can’t be subservient to these hacks who would destroy our nation for a quick buck. We draw the line in the sand here and now. How should we attack Communist Sanders?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81722, "fields": { "description": "“Mr President, we need to bring attention to the fact that Sanders is weak on pretty much every issue. Whether on foreign policy, domestic, you name it. We need to go on the attack, and hard. I know what socialism does. I’ve seen it in Cuba. Maybe we can use that? It’s up to you.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81743, "fields": { "description": " “We can easily upstage and beat Mr Sanders. The moderates despise him, and I’m sure I can convince a few blue-dog Democrats to join our side. You should focus on delivering against him. Down in Texas we’re hard against socialism, we defeated Beto, we can defeat Sanders.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81764, "fields": { "description": "“Sanders is incredibly weak right now, especially after our recent moves. But we need to press the attack. It’ll help with the morale of the GOP. I will focus on his running mate, you focus on the man himself. What do you want to do?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81785, "fields": { "description": "Ruth Bader Ginsburg, a Supreme Court Justice, has passed away. Do you have any comments, Mr. President?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81789, "fields": { "description": "“I have the upmost confidence you’ll win, Mr President. We need to get a huge win here, and I reckon you’ll get it done. We just need to hone in on Sanders weaknesses, and bring our arguments forward. I think we can get the job done, especially since he’s faltering in our internals. Let’s go for it.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81809, "fields": { "description": "“We need a big win, and soon. Maybe in the foreign policy department? I’m right next door to Russia, so I’d like to think I’ve got that sort of experience. However, you’re the main man, you know what you’re doing. What do you wish to do?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81828, "fields": { "description": "“I know what we can do to uplift this campaign. We need to bring this nation back together again. I know just the nation to go against. Cuba is still our rival down in the Caribbean, and neutralising any support for them would be a crucial win. What do you think?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81846, "fields": { "description": "“Let me focus on the domestic front, I can lock that down, and stop the Democrats from gaining some heavy ground. Sanders is particularly weak on Foreign Policy. We can easily outflank him. Maybe we can bring peace somewhere? Just a thought.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81864, "fields": { "description": "“Maybe it’s best if you take some time off The Campaign Trail…it would do you some good to travel abroad for a bit and give us all some peace of mind. Maybe you should travel to our allies overseas and hammer out a deal? It would help us look competent.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81882, "fields": { "description": "“Dear God…Mr President, I’m so sorry. I can’t believe you’ve gotten COVID. Listen, we will try to help secure victory for you while you’re in this state. We won’t rest until America sees how well you’re holding up. This country needs you, now more than ever.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81925, "fields": { "description": "“You need to enter Walter Reed, immediately. You cannot die on the American people, Mr President. The people need stability more than ever, and you provide that. We need to plan ahead for the next 4 years, remember? Please, for the sake of the nation, seek medical assistance.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81944, "fields": { "description": "“I simply have no words. You need to get medical attention immediately. This harms the elderly more than any other group. You need to act quick and decisive. This is between life and death. You cannot die of COVID Mr President. Please.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81963, "fields": { "description": "“I’m, uhm, sorry that you’ve caught this horrid disease. You should go to Walter Reed Medical Center, and seek professional help immediately. Hopefully the opposition won’t take advantage of this…”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81982, "fields": { "description": "“Donald Trump is dead. Now you lead his movement. You have always been ideologically similar to him, so hopefully the coalition stands with you, but still a brutal blow. What do you have to say?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81987, "fields": { "description": "“Donald Trump is dead. Now you lead his movement. You held some views with him, but not much. Hopefully, the MAGA coalition is willing to stand by you while you head into the election, but it doesn’t seem likely. What do you have to say?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81992, "fields": { "description": "“Donald Trump is dead. Now you lead his movement. You’re a true Tea-Party Conservative, and while you’ve been critical of Trump in the past, you have his legacy in your hands. Hopefully, the coalition which Trump gained in 2016 is willing to stay with you till November. What do you have to say?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 81997, "fields": { "description": "“Donald Trump is dead. Now you lead his movement. A GOP moderate through and through, you’re going to have to heavily bank of the sympathy vote from MAGA Republicans. You just have to hope it pushes you across the line. What do you have to say?”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 82002, "fields": { "description": " “With each and every election season that passes, America shifts path, whether it be the New Deal era of the 30s and 40s or the Reagan Era of the 80s, America changes, whether it be good or bad, so on these last few campaign stops, it’s time to ease up a little or go into full gear, the choice is yours, sir.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 82147, "fields": { "description": "\"Ok, Donald, the midterms are coming up soon. We need to make some endorsements. We both have our own wants, but we have tried to work together so far. We need to come up with a plan for how to continue to get a mix of our agendas passed. Who were you thinking?\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 88456, "fields": { "description": "'BERNIE! You have to impress the audience today. It is VITAL that this happens, otherwise, well, it might be doomed. OUR PEOPLE NEED US! I shall be going to one myself as well. WE HAVE TO defeat these CRONIES. We need a HUGE win. Make it happen.\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 88469, "fields": { "description": "'BERNIE! You have to impress the audience today. It is VITAL that this happens, otherwise, well, it might be doomed. OUR PEOPLE NEED US! I shall be going to one myself as well. WE HAVE TO defeat these CRONIES. We need a HUGE win. Make it happen.\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.question", "pk": 88482, "fields": { "description": "'BERNIE! You have to impress the audience today. It is VITAL that this happens, otherwise, well, it might be doomed. OUR PEOPLE NEED US! I shall be going to one myself as well. WE HAVE TO defeat these CRONIES. We need a HUGE win. Make it happen.\"" } } ]; campaignTrail_temp.answers_json = [ { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6109, "fields": { "question": 1300, "description": "It's immigration, Don. Uh, these corporations- Amazon and the like- they use these immigrants as cheap labor. They'd completely get rid of our borders just to spend three bucks less an hour. We're closing it off. Uh, well, maybe a wall is too far, but there are other solutions." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6110, "fields": { "question": 1300, "description": "Donald, if there's one thing we agree on more than anything, it's infrastructure. Rural communities in Iowa have roads that haven't been paved in fifty years. There's these bridges that collapse in on themselves. Worst of all, trains just aren't useful or convenient anymore. We need to fix it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6111, "fields": { "question": 1300, "description": "Listen, okay? Let's focus on these wars. These imperialists start these forever wars for oil, and kill all these civilians. Afghanistan, Yemen, Pakistan, it needs to end. We need to take care of young Americans first and not send them off to fight for big business." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6112, "fields": { "question": 1300, "description": "Uh, Mr. President, you want a competent administration, right? At least something functioning? Then let's focus on foreign policy. Let's establish some clear positions. I'll go somewhere, wherever you like, and we can manage our relations." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6113, "fields": { "question": 1301, "description": "Bernard, we're doing it my way, because quite frankly, my way is better than your way! I am the President of the United States, and I WILL GET MY WAY! Neil Gorsuch- great guy, tremendous record I recommend him, A TRUE CONSERVATIVE. We have the votes, the votes are with us quite frankly, Republicans will back it, and I'm pretty sure good ol' MANCHIN will back it too. WE NEED REAL JUSTICES!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6114, "fields": { "question": 1301, "description": "I see your point Bernie, truly I do, what if we did come to a compromise, truly the greatest of compromises. ART OF THE DEAL! What if we nominated Mr Merrick Garland, He was TERRIBLE under Obama, But we can make it more palatable to Republicans? Maybe we can change party mindset, because frankly, I'm sick and tired of the UNIPARTY BLOCKING MY AGENDA! Bernie, smooth up the senate, we'll go with Garland." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6115, "fields": { "question": 1301, "description": "Y'know, I'll let you have your moment! You have FULL REINS over this. We are against the UNIPARTY after all. What was her name again exactly? Mrs. Denise Johnson? Again Bernie, you have full reins, but there will be a cost to this Bernie- A BIG ONE AT THAT. This is in the spirit of compromise, of course?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6116, "fields": { "question": 1301, "description": "This whole Supreme Court business is, quite frankly, dividing the country to no end. We need a real solution Bernie- We need a committee - MAYBE NEW REFORMS? Term Limits perhaps? Expanding the Court? Great ideas, FROM YOURS TRULY! See what you can get through the Senate Bernie, WE WILL WIN!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6117, "fields": { "question": 1302, "description": "Well, Bernie, to be honest with you, we need to be BOLD in this approach. I want you to go to RUSSIA. Sore topic of discussion for you, I know, but the RADICAL DEMS, THEY THINK I COLLUDED? If you went to Russia, You'd do wonders for this administration, truly, if you want it to work, that is. Meet with Vladimir- Hell, I don't care who you see, Just go to Moscow AND SORT OUT THE DAMN MESS! Dispel the rumours Bernie, it has to be done IMMEDIATELY." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6118, "fields": { "question": 1302, "description": "You should take a trip to CENTRAL AMERICA! Shore up our own backyard. Go to COMMUNIST Cuba for all I care, talk about 'American revitalisation in the area' or some bullshit, listen, we need our area SECURE. Should be a PR masterpiece! They'll say, \"Oh Bernie, WHAT A PEACEMAKER, Maybe he should win the Nobel?\" It'll be tremendous, THE BEST EVER?\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6119, "fields": { "question": 1302, "description": "You stabilize the Homefront Bernard, let me take on the real deal. We need to deal with CHINA, with great strength and even greater speed. We'll talk trade, defense, security and EASING OF TENSIONS. I'll do FAR MORE whatever WARMONGER Obama ever did! Maybe even a quick stop to North Korea, KIM JONG UN WILL RESPECT ME! we need PEACE Bernie, not war!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6120, "fields": { "question": 1302, "description": "Let me take on the real meat chops on foreign policy, I know what I'm doing, I mean, I've done business for decades, trust me! I know the one place which will WELCOME ME with open arms. The United Kingdom, beautiful country, actually where my mother is from, y'know? ! Our 'special relationship' will grow TO NEW HEIGHTS. Theresa May, lovely woman, Let's help her get BREXIT sorted!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6121, "fields": { "question": 1303, "description": "Listen, Bernie, as much I'd LOVE to do something in regards to our nation's health, UNFORTUNATELY, this SOCIALIST agenda does nothing but stagnate us and make great American patriots POORER. Americans do not want a state-funded healthcare system, SORRY! What Americans want is FREEDOM OF CHOICE. That is the end of it Bernie." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6122, "fields": { "question": 1303, "description": "Congressional relations are strained as is Bernie, what the fuck do you expect me to do? We barely have any capital left to spend. Republicans will put me on BLAST for even putting this through. We, frankly, cannot win this fight. However, I do have one idea - I will sign an executive order, a BIG BEAUTIFUL ONE, to lower drug prices ACROSS THE BOARD. It's the best I can do, take it or leave it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6123, "fields": { "question": 1303, "description": "As long as you agree to overturn Obamacare, DISASTROUS POLICY, by the way, and let me have my way with foreign affairs, THEN SO BE IT. We could even call it 'Make America HEALTHY Again', I mean, isn't that what we're about? However Bernie, if this fails, you better own it, because I'm not saving you, and neither will the Democrats, to be honest with you. BE WISE!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6124, "fields": { "question": 1303, "description": "No way in hell this is ever getting passed Bernie, are you INSANE? Republicans will put us on the cross for this, and the Democrats? LORD HAVE MERCY! But Bernard, you have a point. We should use this rhetoric, it'll be so BEAUTIFUL! The people - our fans, they'll cry out 'UNIPARTY BLOCKING HEALTH - NATION IN DISARRAY'. The whole country will soon know of congressional CORRUPTION, on a very HIGH scale!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6125, "fields": { "question": 1304, "description": "Well, uh Mr President, I agree with you wholeheartedly. For too long, our workers, our American workers, have been uh, exploited by big business and the oligarchy. It must end now. For our democracy and our economic potential. First, NAFTA and TPP need to go. Then we should, uhm, target countries with uh, tariffs and negotiation to get our trade deals fair. The workers, our voters, must rely on us for this." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6126, "fields": { "question": 1304, "description": "Mr President, uh, Donald, don't you think we should think this through? We should not make any rash decisions. Allies rely on us for stability and uh, our goods. I have some friends in the Senate, let me draft a bill for our fair-trade plan. Let's bring our allies to the table, and let's hash out a deal. We're going to get our, uh, respect again, as you say." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6127, "fields": { "question": 1304, "description": "Donald- I mean Mr President, listen, we need to withdraw from the TPP and NAFTA agreements first. We need to harness our labor unions and bring the worker first, not the big businesses. Let's focus on renegotiation with our neighbours, then look onto the wider world. You did say America First, didn't you?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6128, "fields": { "question": 1304, "description": "Push the button, Mr President. We need to go nuclear for the base. For too long, we've been sabotaged by those who wish to exploit us. Let's Make America Fair Again." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6129, "fields": { "question": 1305, "description": "Mr President - Sir, we need to seriously cool down the rhetoric. Workers will always come first, but we cannot, uh, scapegoat immigrants for the messes of previous administrations. We need comprehensive reform, not uhm, destructive rhetoric. Sorry Mr President, I can't in good conscience argue for this." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6130, "fields": { "question": 1305, "description": "Well - you may have a point, our workers, they're uh, being trampled by cheap labor, our workers undercut, and our factories being shipped off. A wall isn't out of the question but, can we just look at needing stronger checks, and uh, stronger security? We should balance this with some more *viable* ways for people to gain citizenship. I'll speak to the Senate, Donald, trust me" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6131, "fields": { "question": 1305, "description": "A wall is out of the question, but what we can do is, uh, bring both parties together and get a commission set up, to see if uh, what we can do for compromises. I mean, we need a real policy on immigration, and I want this administration to work. Let me get the Senate together, we can come up with uh, some solutions." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6133, "fields": { "question": 1306, "description": "Bernard, please, listen to yourself, I mean, our country is in peril. We need to defend ourselves against OUR ENEMIES. Not one cut. We can look in other areas. WE HAVE THE BEST MILITARY, AND THATS WITH OUR SPENDING. You heard me. Not one dime cut. We're making it GREAT again!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6134, "fields": { "question": 1306, "description": "You make a good point, Bernie, For too long, the MILITARY INDUSTRIAL COMPLEX, with all its power and might, has disrupted our way of life. War-Hawks surround Washington. Tell them we're going to cut it, and we will have the press hail it as a VICTORY for the PEOPLE! Redistribution to our services, it's what you like most Bernie! MAKE AMERICA FAIR AGAIN!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6135, "fields": { "question": 1306, "description": "These people - The neo-cons, they'll kill me Bernie, slaughter me in congress, I mean, I just can't do it without approval. They'll be up my ass about it in no time. MAYBE we should focus our efforts on \"spreading out\" our money to \"DOMESTIC SECURITY\"! Put it into immigration services. We will have the best plan for it, TRUST ME!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6136, "fields": { "question": 1306, "description": "This is very dangerous, Bernard, listen to me, and listen to me very carefully. We need a stronger, more resilient military. More spending, not less. We're taking our country back. Disastrous OBAMA ruined it in Libya, and DUBYA- WHAT A FIASCO! Deal with it Bernie, let me handle this military stuff. I'M THE TOP GUY!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6137, "fields": { "question": 1307, "description": "Bernie, you're totally right- I mean, our people, they need to hear us. Congress is so so bad, we need a break! Get me out there to MY PEOPLE! The real question is, where do WE go? I think the answer’s obvious. Go to our favorite place - the Rust Belt. From Minnesota to Pennsylvania, we shall barnstorm each state. We are going to \"FIGHT THE ESTABLISHMENT\" - Believe me Bernie, our ratings will go THROUGH THE ROOF!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6138, "fields": { "question": 1307, "description": "We should do SEPARATE rallies. Each to their own. Listen Bernard, you have your rallies wherever. I'm doing mine in the South. Approvals are UNDERWATER because of you! I mean, I'm their favorite President, I will sort this mess out MYSELF and they WILL respect me. MAGA!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6139, "fields": { "question": 1307, "description": "Listen Bernie, America has never seen this sort of administration before. We need to FIGHT everywhere. I think we have tapped something deep within America. If you focus your efforts in New England, I will go down to the big and beautiful west, THE ROCKIES! We have GREAT potential to achieve the impossible." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6140, "fields": { "question": 1307, "description": "Oh, this'll be a doozy. Let's travel to New York together, put on a show. We were both born there, and we have a chance Bernie, truly we do. New York RESPECTS us. They'll say, \"BIGGEST RALLY SEEN SINCE EVER\", and we'll reach BIG APPROVALS. It'll be beautiful. They say Brooklyn is nice this time of year." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6141, "fields": { "question": 1308, "description": "We're gonna go big on this one! HUGE! We need to give the PEOPLE what they want. They don't want these BORING people like Schumer and McConnell. They want some REAL populists. People like you and me. We're endorsing those working for THE PEOPLE!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6142, "fields": { "question": 1308, "description": "These partisans are the ones standing in OUR way! Won't vote for something I want because YOU'RE attached, or the other way around. It ends NOW!!! We're endorsing independents and third parties. They'll vote for what's RIGHT! Not for what's red or blue!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6143, "fields": { "question": 1308, "description": "I'm not endorsing your SHILLS you call DEMOCRATS! I doubt you'll endorse my good LOYAL Republicans. If we each go our own way, people can decide for THEMSELVES which of us they want more. You'll see Bernie!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6144, "fields": { "question": 1309, "description": "We need to uh, protect our workers. I know what to do Donald. Let me go on a picket line, show them that the administration is with them. We need a war on these big multinationals who, for so long, have exploited the workers of our nation. It is time it ends. We will rebuild and reshape America for the downtrodden." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6145, "fields": { "question": 1309, "description": "Mr Trump, our base of support - the working class - they need desperate help. Big business and politicians have stifled middle class growth. They've stifled the American Worker. We need to be bold. Endorse Unions, Donald, it's the only way. The President of the United States, behind our workers. It is the right thing to do." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6146, "fields": { "question": 1309, "description": "The workers Donald - They haven't had a wage increase since 2009. That is, uh, disgusting, to be honest with you. If you care about workers as you say you do, you should push it to $12 minimum. It's been stuck at 7 dollars and what do workers have to show for it? Look at their conditions Mr President. It's diabolical." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6147, "fields": { "question": 1309, "description": "Mr President - We should meet with Union delegations, like the Teamsters, to see what we can do in terms of legislation. We need to be pro-Worker, otherwise, our industries, they'll collapse. We need a better system - and we can get it. Better maternity pay, better health insurance, better hours. Let's do it Donald, for our country!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6152, "fields": { "question": 1311, "description": "Totally agree Bernard! Our people, they totally need us, our support, our love! Direct the Senate to draft a bill to provide $2000 in relief to families all across America IMMEDIATELY. FURTHERMORE, you should direct more ATTENTION to Student Debt Relief. Maybe Bernie, MAYBE include it in the bill, I know how much YOU LOVE IT. They'll love us, the young people, they'll find it amazing!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6153, "fields": { "question": 1311, "description": "Our country needs financial stability. Listen Bernie, I GET YOU, truly I DO, however, its going to be money down the DRAIN in such little time. What difference would it make? Bring up a bill for more PPE, more masks, and more prevention gear to help our great American PATRIOTS. Has to be done Bernie, has to be, otherwise we won't have a country anymore." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6154, "fields": { "question": 1311, "description": "You're right Mr VP! We need to provide AMAZING relief to our people, they need us! Get the Senate, draft up a bill for $1500 in relief and include student debt relief as well. The young people, in colleges, THEY'LL LOVE US! Slightly liberal to my liking, but still, LOVE THEM!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6155, "fields": { "question": 1311, "description": "Bernie, what you're asking is GENERATIONS of BORROWING. However, just for you, WE'LL DO IT. $1200 in relief for our people, they need it, they truly do, We'll come roaring back! Unfortunately Bernard, NO to student relief, just can't do it, we don't know if its EVEN CONSTITUTIONAL. SAD!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6156, "fields": { "question": 1312, "description": "Alright, uh, let's see here...I'll stick to my points, bring out the charisma, and keep it brief. I won't be seen as some attack dog by the press, I need composure. I've got time to prepare, and uh, well, hopefully not face the worst of it..." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6157, "fields": { "question": 1312, "description": "Deflect, Attack, Defend. That shall be my strategy. The Establishment will try and throw everything at me, but I'll hold my ground. I won't falter, don't worry Donald." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6158, "fields": { "question": 1312, "description": "This is a battle for the dignity of our nation. We cannot falter in the face of the Establishment. We draw the line here. I'll hammer home our accomplishments and stay above the fray." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6159, "fields": { "question": 1312, "description": "I'll just wing it, it'll be okay." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6160, "fields": { "question": 1313, "description": "Wow. I didn’t know that. I just — you’re telling me now for the first time. She led an amazing life. What else can you say? She was an amazing woman. Whether you agree or not, she was an amazing woman who led an amazing life. I’m actually saddened to hear that. I am saddened to hear that." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6161, "fields": { "question": 1313, "description": "The passing of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg is a tremendous loss to our country. She was an extraordinary champion of justice and equal rights, and will be remembered as one of the great justices in modern American history." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6164, "fields": { "question": 1314, "description": "I'll be okay Bernie, trust me, I'm the toughest, most fittest president. No one can match it frankly, I'll go for my check-up, if it helps ease your concern. I'll be fine, believe me, otherwise the base, our movement, it'll dissipate." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6166, "fields": { "question": 1314, "description": "Thank you Bernard, it means a lot, truly, it does. I'll go, and then come back better than ever before. We gotta win, we have to, otherwise we won't have a country anymore. Keep up the rallies for me, I'll be back in a while." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6168, "fields": { "question": 1315, "description": "This COVID-19 needs to be eradicated, no matter the cost. Whatever we need to do, we'll do it. I want you to go to Dr Fauci, and sort out this entire MESS created by the Chinese. Leadership is crucial, you're right. I, DONALD TRUMP, will be the face of it all. AMERICA will ROAR back better than EVER before!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6169, "fields": { "question": 1315, "description": "Bernard, listen, it's okay. It's HALF THE WORLD AWAY? Why should we worry? We shouldn't panic the public Bernie, otherwise, we'll lose credibility. I won't have that on my watch. Everyone knows I'm a STRONGMAN, China won't square off against me. They'll stop." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6170, "fields": { "question": 1315, "description": "Lockdown ALL travel to China, these LOSERS wont go anywhere near us. I don't want this CHINESE VIRUS on US soil. This will remain a free country, and the BEST country, but restrict air travel to China. There is no way I am dealing with this disease. Not my PROBLEM." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6171, "fields": { "question": 1315, "description": "I want you to head the taskforce against this virus Bernard, it'll give amazing RESPONSIBILITY to you. They'll say, 'Oh how wonderful, so much bipartisanship!', the ratings will SOAR. I have high hopes Bernie, high hopes! This will be our MOMENT!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6172, "fields": { "question": 1316, "description": "I totally agree, Bernard! Why don't you go down there yourself to RUFFLE the feathers? I think you'd love it, and people have ALWAYS said you lack the chops to do it, so I give you AMAZING RESPONSIBILITY! Give us a great look Bernie, otherwise, well, you know, I'd have to kick you off. NO HARD FEELINGS!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6173, "fields": { "question": 1316, "description": "I will go to the NATO Summit MYSELF! They need a strong leader - which I am one, by the way, and they need TOUGHNESS. These countries- they don't know what they're doing! IT'S CRAZY? They have to pay 2%, they have to, otherwise they won't have a country anymore. Pressure is important Mr VP!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6174, "fields": { "question": 1316, "description": "We're gonna go, together of course, to fight. Fight and win is what I call it, we need to make sure NATO has our backs, and we have theirs. Did I mention I love NATO? Anyways - Let us go, and we'll make a great impression!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6175, "fields": { "question": 1316, "description": "Why should we even bother Bernard? They treat us awfully - so called 'LAUGHING STOCK', it makes NO sense. We're the strongest, we don't need them, at all. Tell them we're not going. Say the 'LEADER OF THE FREE WORLD' is busy with domestic matters." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6176, "fields": { "question": 1317, "description": "As much as I appreciate the gesture - no way in HELL am I joining the Republicans. They are the complete opposite to my beliefs. And I'd rather be an independent anyways Don. Listen, I think going independent is the way to go. Both the Democrats and Republicans in congress despise both you and me. We're the devil to them. Let's play that to our advantage." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6177, "fields": { "question": 1317, "description": "The sentiment is there Donald, and I think there would be a significant chance a large section of the population would follow us, but I also have my doubts about getting the nomination for VP in a Republican field and you for the Democrats, I'm certainly no Joe Lieberman and neither are you. You, and you only, can secure my place in this administration, if you so wish." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6178, "fields": { "question": 1317, "description": "Congressional Democrats and Republicans hate us both, we're unpopular within large sections of the population and our agenda is crumbling. We need a rebrand. We need a new party. Whether it survives without us or not doesn't matter, but we need one now." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6179, "fields": { "question": 1317, "description": "We should stick to what we currently have. We have bipartisan credentials, and I'm confident that we can secure our nominations through whatever means. Now whether or not the RNC and DNC allows it is a different question, but we must stand firm." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6180, "fields": { "question": 1318, "description": "Bernard, we all know that those people are vile, but SCREAMING it out loud in a rally isn't a good look. We can try and push in some redistricting in states which are BLATANTLY being persecuted on their unfair districts, otherwise we can’t do much, sorry to tell you Bernie!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6181, "fields": { "question": 1318, "description": "Now is the time. We need to ENERGIZE our base to try and push in something BIG if we want to get stuff done, we need to set up independent, bipartisan boards for redistricting, create a federal department, to oversee any new district changes and a redistricting in all southern states that have been recognised for gerrymandering. " } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6182, "fields": { "question": 1318, "description": "Let’s push a little bit, with independent committees to overview redistricting only in the Deep South as of right now, some redistricting only in the states of Alabama, Mississippi, Louisiana and South Carolina, if we push more they will KILL US in the polls Bernie, WE'D BE SLAUGHTERED!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6183, "fields": { "question": 1318, "description": "This is a bad look, like a real bad look, we need to bunker down for a bit, only redistricting in Alabama and Louisiana could be acceptable to do, otherwise we will be swamped down and NEVER get ANYTHING DONE! Bernie, I love the idea, BUT UNFORTUNATELY, CANT GO BIG! SORRY!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6184, "fields": { "question": 1319, "description": "Donald, I completely agree. For too long, our American workers have been beaten over taxes. For too long, our BILLIONAIRES have taken tax cut after tax cut. It ends. Get a tax reduction for the working class, they need it, Mr President. Hike it up on those leeches that are CEO's. Whatever the means - Populism will win out." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6185, "fields": { "question": 1319, "description": "Yes. Hike them on the rich. We will use it to fund a national health initiative. We should look at small tax cuts for the working class, and try to find more affordable ways for the people to live. It's awful out there Donald, we need to help them, but realistically, tax cuts aren't the answer on this one." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6186, "fields": { "question": 1319, "description": "We need to sort out our nation's debt, Mr President. Tax cuts will exacerbate it. Our country is on the brink of bankruptcy, and we cannot continue to raise the debt limit. We need to abolish it, full stop. We need to direct more funds into solving the debt crisis, not funding tax cuts." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6188, "fields": { "question": 1320, "description": "For seven months now, Sleepy Joe Biden has barely left the basement of his house. That ends now, and I'm pretty confident the American people won't like what they see from him." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6189, "fields": { "question": 1320, "description": "For seven months now, Sleepy Joe Biden has barely left the basement of his house. That ends now, and I'm pretty confident the American people won't like what they see from him." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6190, "fields": { "question": 1320, "description": "For seven months now, Sleepy Joe Biden has barely left the basement of his house.
