That ends now, and I'm pretty confident the American people won't like what they see from him." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6191, "fields": { "question": 1320, "description": "Year after after, Republicans subject themselves to sham debates with slanted questions and one-sided moderators. Why should we force the voters to watch that charade again?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6192, "fields": { "question": 1321, "description": "Donald- We need calmness, stability. This isn't the way to approach these things. We need to bring these people to the table. Ask what they want, and compromise. It isn't a dirty word, its uh, the spirit of our country" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6193, "fields": { "question": 1321, "description": "Let me talk to these protestors Mr President, let me reach out and see what they wish to accomplish. I agree, the violence has to end, and that protest should never get out of hand. Let's call for an end to the violence, together. We'll put on a good show, in your words." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6194, "fields": { "question": 1321, "description": "We need restraint, and we need order. But cracking down hard isn't the way to go, nor is 'defunding the police'. Maybe we should offer a new promise of reforming our justice system, and helping those unfairly prosecuted. We need to Make America Fair Again." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6195, "fields": { "question": 1321, "description": "I can't do everything at once Mr President, I just can't. You need to handle this, this is your problem. I sympathize with them, I truly do, but you are the President of the United States. Let me focus on the virus, you handle other domestic matters." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6196, "fields": { "question": 1322, "description": "Michigan, Wisconsin, Minnesota. Game, Set, Match." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6197, "fields": { "question": 1322, "description": "Arizona, Nevada, Oregon. Game, Set, Match." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6198, "fields": { "question": 1322, "description": "Georgia, Florida, North Carolina. Game, Set, Match." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6199, "fields": { "question": 1322, "description": "Ohio, Pennsylvania, Virginia. Game, Set, Match." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6200, "fields": { "question": 1323, "description": "We need to bring out a dynasty that still has appeal. Still has...potential. I know just the man. Robert F. Kennedy Jr. He can bring that \"Kennedy\" magic long sought after. Maybe some good press coverage as well..." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6201, "fields": { "question": 1323, "description": "Prime time speaking slot? We could go with Jesse Ventura, a veteran, an actor and someone who has conviction. He might have some...unconventional views, however, he can bring that energy to a convention. He's the man we need to energize our base." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6202, "fields": { "question": 1323, "description": "A wild card might be in play here. Donald, do everything you can, we should get Rand Paul on stage for our prime slot. He's got that outsider energy, and he can bring a useful voice to our campaign. He's got a strong base of support with a very vocal group. Let's reach out." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6203, "fields": { "question": 1323, "description": "Mr President...what if we went with the son of a man who brought into question the two party system? What if we brought on Ross Perot Jr, and gave him our slot. We could very well reinvigorate the populist base and go full throttle." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6204, "fields": { "question": 1324, "description": "Here's to the finest administration in American history! We should CELEBRATE our SUCCESS across our 'political home', THE MIDWEST. I will go to Pennsylvania, Ohio and Michigan. You should go to Iowa, Wisconsin and Minnesota. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6205, "fields": { "question": 1324, "description": "We're going to win BIG. I will shore up our support in Georgia, North Carolina and Florida. You should go to Virginia, New Jersey and...well...HOLD A RALLY IN DC! Showing unity, they'll say, \"oh Bernie was so Presidential!\". The press, THEY'LL LOVE IT!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6206, "fields": { "question": 1324, "description": "Have faith Bernard, we're not going to stop winning, maybe EVER. I will travel to Arizona and New Mexico. You should go to Nevada and Oregon. We're gonna spread our message across the West, and they will LOVE IT. MAKE AMERICA FAIR AGAIN!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6207, "fields": { "question": 1324, "description": "To be honest Bernie, I think we're gonna win in a landslide, such a BIG win for our team. I will go across Maine and New Hampshire, our message is POPULAR there. BERNARD, TRUST ME, they will LOVE you in Connecticut and Rhode Island, MAYBE EVEN A TRIP TO VERMONT? The choice is yours!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6208, "fields": { "question": 1325, "description": "Trump - what we need to do is send, a uh, clear signal to the Middle East. I know what we can do. Recognise Palestine. It's the only way Mr President. You want our money to stop being spent overseas? This is how you do it. Israel won't know what to, uh, do. Support a two-state solution, it's only right." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 6209, "fields": { "question": 1325, "description": "We should coordinate with our allies to remove ISIS off the map without our direct involvement. We've spent trillions of dollars on a pointless war, Mr President. We need that money SPENT IN AMERICA. We need to be fair again. Tell Mr. Netanyahu that America is no longer fighting their wars. We need to rally the base." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 42533, "fields": { "question": 42532, "description": "Me and Donald, while we had our profound differences and disagreements, we worked as a team. We worked as one. I could say, for a matter of fact, he grew to be a friend. A loyal man, and someone who has always put Americans first. I swear to you now, as I become the new President of these United States, that I will carry on his legacy and fight to Make America Fair Again. Because that is what he would have wanted. Donald, may you Rest in Peace, and may God bless America." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 42536, "fields": { "question": 1325, "description": "We need to be humane, Donald. Let's get Israel and a Palestinian delegation together, and let's try and talk it out. Maybe get the Saudis and Turkish involved. We need peace, it's what we both campaigned on. We need to end the foreign wars there. If we can get a real coalition from these nations, and focus on ISIS, our approvals, they'll skyrocket. We need this." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 42538, "fields": { "question": 1325, "description": "To be honest Mr President, I don't really want much of a say in this. You and I both know, no matter what we do, people will still be angry. Let's uh, make sure we make some comments here and there, but nothing concrete. It already is an incredibly fragile situation, we cannot add onto it. Let's take a back seat, and let them fight it out. Focus on America." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 56123, "fields": { "question": 4167, "description": "put definition here" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 68245, "fields": { "question": 6741, "description": "enter definition" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 68246, "fields": { "question": 78656, "description": "enter definition" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 78488, "fields": { "question": 71452, "description": "We need law and order, its as simple as that Bernie. These THUGS think they can occupy our cities? It’s a disgrace frankly, and they’ll be HELL to pay. Trust me Bernie, I have this under control. BACK THE BLUE!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 78489, "fields": { "question": 71452, "description": "Fine, fine, I’ll meet them, their organisation, I mean. Why bother though? They detest me, and they dislike you for being WITH ME! What would be the point Bernie, I’m half-tempted not to do it, but for you, I will, for our amazing unity. I’ll see them." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 78490, "fields": { "question": 71452, "description": "Let’s do reform, great word, we need to do it, you’re right. The justice system is rigged, to be honest, WE NEED PEACE! I’m going to do whatever is necessary Bernard, to help things calm down. You need this just as much as I do. We’ll figure it out, it’ll be GREAT!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 78491, "fields": { "question": 71452, "description": "All these things they say about us, why should we? CONSTANTLY ATTACKED, harrassed even. Why should we put up with this abuse? I refuse to do this Bernie, I just do, they have no idea. You’ll have to do this, I can't stand them. Just go." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 79073, "fields": { "question": 79072, "description": "Listen, Don- I know we both have our ideal kicklines we'd love to shove through the Senate-- but that's not happening. We can't bicker about this, the people need leadership and reassurance now more than ever. Please, just dial this back a-and maybe we can come to a compromise sooner rather than later." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 79075, "fields": { "question": 79072, "description": "Woah, woah woah-- you've forgotten I'm President of the Senate, Don. This is, ultimately, my turf. Tell you what, I think we can strike a deal here-- I won't strike down any of your foreign policy picks, *IF* you let me handle the domestic picks. Whether you like it or not, we need bipartisanship, and a cabinet full of elephants doesn't serve any good." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 79077, "fields": { "question": 79072, "description": "Don... Donald- What the fuck is this? Patrick Shanahan as Secretary of Defense? No, I'm not having this. I'm president of a 50/50 Senate, you know that right? I'd be willing to cut you a deal, even. I'll let you send through all the domestic picks you want, just let me handle the foreign policy guys Donald." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 79105, "fields": { "question": 67678, "description": "Frankly Bernard, this guy's a loser, one of those 'MAVERICKS' who acts bi-partisan, but is a WHACKJOB who is in the ESTABLISHMENT. I'll nail him to the wall, trust me. These Dems, they'll hate him, we have you Bernie, THEIR SAVIOR!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 79671, "fields": { "question": 79670, "description": "I- I don't get it. Why would Mr King betray me like this...I- I need a minute Donald...." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 79779, "fields": { "question": 79778, "description": "Tiny Mike Bloomberg is a JOKE! He wrecked the city of New York, a fantastic city, with his utter CON JOB of stop and frisk! Stopping random people on the basis of, frankly, you know, they say it’s random, but everyone knows he has a terrible relationship with the blacks. Not like you and me. This will be a cakewalk. Who is going to vote for this little prick?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 79901, "fields": { "question": 37589, "description": "It'll be so easy Bernard, {{opLast}} has no chance. It'll be great, maybe the biggest win ever. They'll keep it in the history books! They're sore losers, I'm going to crush them, like ants, metaphorically, of course. BELIEVE ME BERNARD, I'll win, BIG LEAGUE!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 79903, "fields": { "question": 37589, "description": "It's all about the sound bites Bernard, it's all about it. No one watches the full debate, I mean, who does? Sound bites will change everything. The media, our people, they'll gobble it up, it'll be TREMENDOUS. So much potential Bernie, I'm going to pulverise them, just watch." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 79908, "fields": { "question": 37589, "description": "I don't need advice, I don't need help, I'll just wing it. I did it in 2016, and it did me no harm. Believe me, if I destroyed those wimps in the Republican party, it will be even better this time round. I have faith, and so should you. MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 79911, "fields": { "question": 37589, "description": "Maybe you're right Bernie, maybe you're right, I'll take a few days off, and prepare like hell, otherwise they'll try and outwit me, which they can't do, but it's best to be SAFE! They have no idea, I'll be able to destroy them with \"facts and logic\" as Shapiro would say, what a loser by the way, but we're gonna WIN!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80011, "fields": { "question": 1314, "description": "I need to stay on The Campaign Trail Bernard, otherwise we lose our momentum. It's just a sniffle, it doesn't matter, because we have a country to save. I will not let the DEEP STATE try to ruin it for our movement." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80014, "fields": { "question": 1314, "description": "Y'know, I'll take my chances. I'll stay at the White House, obviously, but I don't need to go to the hospital. It's nothing, besides, I have social media. The people love it. Twitter is truly great, they love me, except the woke establishment, but since when have we needed them?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80044, "fields": { "question": 80043, "description": "So we have a RINO and someone who NO ONE, and I mean NO ONE, has ever heard of, is running for the Presidency? WHAT A JOKE! We're going to beat these LOSERS into the dirt. We're going to Make America Fair Again and Make America Great Again!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80071, "fields": { "question": 67678, "description": "This could be our big break, you're right Bernie, could very well be. This nobody doesn't stand a chance against me. Maybe we could use this to our ADVANTAGE. Get your friends in the Senate and House Bernard, we're going to be making waves. DEMS ENDORSING US? Just watch. They'll fall in line." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80073, "fields": { "question": 67678, "description": "Actually, did you know, this guy is a DINO, I mean, he's a total tree hugger! He went to Greenland to see those melting ice caps, between you and me that's fake news. He's gonna take away BEAUTIFUL JOBS, we gotta get with the miners, West Virginia and Pennsylvania, send them the message, he's a crazy green hippie." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80083, "fields": { "question": 67678, "description": "This guy is a total HAWK. Wants us in all these foreign wars, which frankly shouldn't be ANY of our business. This guy's a loser, how'd he even win the nomination? I'm going to hold him above the fire. Our ratings will soar, trust me, and we're gonna WIN SO HARD!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80090, "fields": { "question": 80053, "description": "Donald, let’s be realistic. Deadlock is all but inevitable, and we don’t stand a chance if it goes to Congress. We need to lock in states which are favorable to us while also expanding the map. I’ll go and reach out, and you, uh, can hold the rallies in our safe areas, just give it time." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80092, "fields": { "question": 80070, "description": "He wants to flood us Bernie, absolutely FLOOD this country with illegal migrants, stealing our AMERICAN jobs. It can't happen. IT WON'T! This guy is a fraud, I mean, he shows up out of nowhere, and now EXPECTS to be President? Not on my watch. He has no idea what he's doing." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80094, "fields": { "question": 80070, "description": "Votes against everyone, and expects people to support him? WHAT A JOKE! Let's play it up for the media Bernard, this guy is punching way above his weight. ANGRY ANGUS is losing his marbles, and everyone can see it. Get him out!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80096, "fields": { "question": 80070, "description": "This guy is so old, like what, 75 plus? I know we're old Bernard, but this guy needs to GET OUT of politics. LITTLE ANGY doesn't know what day it is! You know, we're so strong, you and me, CHARISMATIC! We should do those cognitive tests, and serve it up to all those FAKE NEWS." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80098, "fields": { "question": 80070, "description": "What's this guy done for Maine other than COMPLAIN about NOT ENOUGH MONEY being spent in the state. What a loser. We're gonna plaster Maine wall to wall with ADs, and he's gonna hate it. Just watch. 'NO KINGS IN AMERICA.' The base will love it!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80101, "fields": { "question": 80100, "description": "I'll hit him where it hurts. His business record. He, uh, hurt our workers Donald, he has no relation to our base. He's a phony, a fraud, and a con artist. He continues, to uh, scam our American workers. I'll put an end to it. Romney needs to go back to Utah with his tail between his legs." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80103, "fields": { "question": 80100, "description": "Easy. He's a loser. Literally. He lost against Kennedy in '94. He lost 2012. He's led so many failed businesses. It isn't even close. I mean, quite honestly Donald, he has nothing to stand on. I'm gonna hammer him on this and we're gonna reinvigorate our base." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80105, "fields": { "question": 80100, "description": "Democrats won't support this ticket with him on. He ran as a Republican in 2012, as a partisan mind you. Remember that 47% thing? Romney has no idea what he's done to his own reputation. Our working-class base despises that man. He has no spine." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80107, "fields": { "question": 80100, "description": "Another establishment candidate. When will they learn? Americans are tired of the same old. We're gonna bring a new dynamic to American politics. Romney is stuck in the past, and I'll blast him on that." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80110, "fields": { "question": 80109, "description": "The guy is a total fraud, and I saw it first hand in New York. We knew the same people, y’know, all up in Manhattan, they know him just as well as I do. I’m gonna hold a press conference, the people, our people, they’ll eat it up. They’ll call him a ‘LOSER’, a ‘PHONY’, it’ll be beautiful." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80111, "fields": { "question": 80109, "description": "You should see how he treats women, I mean, the comments he’s made? Disgusting, terrible, I mean some real terrible things. Oh, it’ll be beautiful, they’ll say he’s so unpresidential, and, y'know, paint me as a real hero. It’ll be great Bernie, just watch." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80112, "fields": { "question": 80109, "description": "He bought his way here. Everyone knows it, and yet no one is willing to stop it. A crony at best, and an oligarch at worst. Bernie, you really tapped into something here. These people, they control all the capital, we’re going to use it. They’ll have no idea. We’re going to beat them back, big league." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80113, "fields": { "question": 80109, "description": "Y’know, we’re both old Bernie, but we have spirit, energy, feelings. I mean, get a load of Bloomberg, imagine being at the convention, and this guy is on primetime? I’d fall asleep. He’s so old, he’s like, almost 80? What a joke!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80119, "fields": { "question": 80118, "description": "Bernie, this guy, I mean, why should we be afraid? He doesn’t inspire loyalty, or commitment, or well, ANYTHING! Why should we take him seriously? People see through him, the guy has no loyalty, just look at his party registrations!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80121, "fields": { "question": 80118, "description": "Our people, they love their nicknames. Crooked Hillary, Sleepy Joe, all the works, it’s great, all made by me, of course! How about, Mini-me-Mike, I mean, he’s basically the same person as me! We are both New York billionaires, but he is not some revolutionary, like me!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80123, "fields": { "question": 80118, "description": "We’re making it great again Bernie, can’t people see that? We’re bringing America back from the brink, these people, they won’t allow stop-and-search Mike! Believe me, we’re going to run on our achievements, I mean, we have so many, soon we’ll get tired of WINNING!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80125, "fields": { "question": 80118, "description": "Y’know, why don’t we just ignore him, he just wants headlines, I mean, that’s why he ran for Mayor of my beautiful home, which he tarnished, by the way. I can’t stand that little bastard, but why should we worry? He’s a total fraud, we’ve got the energy, the momentum, it’s amazing." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80128, "fields": { "question": 80127, "description": "Maybe I should take a page out of your book, so to speak. I’ll get the ads going, and the lines prepared. It’ll work like a charm, or at least I hope so, the contrast couldn’t be further apart. A rich millionaire with nothing to lose, or someone who stands up for the average American." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80130, "fields": { "question": 80127, "description": "I think our, uh, economic policies will resonate a hell of a lot more with your ‘Average Joe’ than whatever Kasich has to offer. All he ever aspired to be was a man in a suit with a fancy company name. He’s out of touch, and I’m going to go after him relentlessly for it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80132, "fields": { "question": 80127, "description": "I think, honestly, I’ll stick to my uplifting messaging. Sure, he has the money, but we have the uh, compassion, and we can really use it. Let’s be honest, Kasich and Bloomberg don’t have anything going for them bar money, we could really use this to our advantage, Donald." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80134, "fields": { "question": 80127, "description": "His record as governor of Ohio leaves a lot to be desired. He abandoned his countrymen in their time of need. Our workers, they felt betrayed by him. All he did as governor was stand up for big business, allow crime to be spread, and did nothing to solve our justice system. It almost makes me feel sick." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80137, "fields": { "question": 80136, "description": "He is a nobody, YOU'RE RIGHT! Why should we take him seriously again? He was mayor, for like, what, 3 years or something? NO ONE KNOWS! Is it any clearer the UNIPARTY gave up now? They went with some hack who has no clue what he's doing." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80139, "fields": { "question": 80136, "description": "It's so easy Bernard, so easy. Just taunt the 'man'. He looks like he's going to cry at any moment. 'MAYOR PETE' is one of *those*. What a loser. Why should we even bother? Alfred E. Neuman really should sit this one out, if he knows what's good for him." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80141, "fields": { "question": 80136, "description": "He calls himself a centrist Bernie, what a fraud. He's just doing it for the votes, which he doesn't have. Why don't we SNATCH up votes from all across the spectrum? We're going to MAKE AMERICA FEEL THE BERN. Unstoppable coalition they'll call it. Bigger. Stronger. BETTER." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80143, "fields": { "question": 80136, "description": "Claims to be a Midwesterner at heart, YET ADORES THE ELITES? Is he insane? He has no connection to our base, OUR people. No idea. I'm going to crush him, metaphorically speaking of course. He has the audacity to claim to be a 'working-man'. HE HAS NO IDEA!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80146, "fields": { "question": 80145, "description": "This woman has a TERRIBLE record as Governor. Ruined South Carolina, ruined politics, RUINED EVERYTHING. Now she wants to run the GREAT United States? What a joke- we're gonna rip her record apart. Nothing like it, so TERRIBLE." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80148, "fields": { "question": 80145, "description": "They are nobodies Bernie, don't worry. She's a total loser, no accomplishments, no respect, NO NOTHING! How can she expect to go against us? We're going full throttle on this. MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80150, "fields": { "question": 80145, "description": "America, frankly, isn't ready for *her* to be president. I mean, am I wrong Bernie? We shouldn't go after her for it, well, maybe subtly, but nothing more. Conservatives WON'T vote for her. We're gonna win so much, you're gonna be tired of WINNING!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80152, "fields": { "question": 80145, "description": "Why should we even set a narrative? Let's go positive Bernard, the people, and our ratings, will soar. The MEDIA, the fake news, they have no idea, none at all. We're gonna Keep America Fair, and keep it GREAT!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80155, "fields": { "question": 80154, "description": "Well- Edwards is climbing the political ladder. Isn’t that obvious? First he’s climbed through Louisiana, suppressed women’s rights and now he wants to be Vice President? I’m going to hit him hard on the whole ‘6-week abortion ban’. Rebirth is the party of women, we can definitely use that line." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80157, "fields": { "question": 80154, "description": "Brian Kemp has only just been elected as governor, and now wants to be VP? This is just yet another establishment power grab, and one we can exploit. We're going to campaign on this, and talk about another establishment stitch-up. We won't allow them to control our politics!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80158, "fields": { "question": 80154, "description": "I don't think they have the energy to do this job. No energy from what I've learnt about them, nor the charisma. We both might be a bit old Donald, but at least we have that fighting energy. Let's bring it up, and let's say we're more fit for the job. I think it'll work wonderfully." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80159, "fields": { "question": 80154, "description": "Yet more and more establishment candidates. When will they learn? Americans are tired of the same old. We're gonna bring a new dynamic to American politics. Edwards and Kemp are stuck in the past, and I'll blast them on that." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80165, "fields": { "question": 80164, "description": "Everyone knows how much of a SELLOUT she is, I mean, look at her ties to Wall Street! Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, you name it, she’s a complete fraud. I’m going to destroy her, her ties, everything. She would plunge America into a kleptocratic NIGHTMARE! I will NOT let it happen!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80167, "fields": { "question": 80164, "description": "She couldn’t beat me 4 years ago, and now she wants a re-run? Pathetic. It’s like she’s running for her own AMBITION. She, frankly, has no interest in America, whereas we Bernie, we’re patriots, always have been. We’re going to Keep America Safe from HER." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80169, "fields": { "question": 80164, "description": "I don’t want to give her attention, she’s just begging for it at this rate. Democrats have gone CRAZY. Why are they running her again? Why should we even campaign? Is this a vendetta campaign? Just keep it positive Bernard, the base, they’ll eat it up." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80171, "fields": { "question": 80164, "description": "She’s a criminal, look at her emails, look at Benghazi. Crooked Hillary is a DISGRACE, we have to beat her Bernie, we have to, otherwise our justice system will be after us. She’s done it before, and she’d do it again, we can’t have it be this way!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80174, "fields": { "question": 80173, "description": "Well, to be honest Bernie, I think he's only popular in Vermont. Does anyone know who this guy is? Don't worry, I'm going to set the stage. A fraud. A loser. A SUCKER. He won't know what hit them, y'know? We shouldn't worry so much about some nobody from a nobody state." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80175, "fields": { "question": 80173, "description": "He's a born and bred establishment figure Bernard, total freakshow. We're going to label him as such. They say, 'Oh, he's so bi-partisan, we love him so much!', That's going to change, BIG LEAGUE. The base are going to love it, believe me, they love this sorta stuff." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80178, "fields": { "question": 80173, "description": "We have to bring our coalition together Bernie, unity is needed, the people, they NEED us. Let's bring out the BIG GUNS. Get every outsider endorsement POSSIBLE. Desperate times call for desperate measures. Anything, I mean anything, to turn the tide, NOW!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80180, "fields": { "question": 80173, "description": "Scott is a total nutjob, a looney at that. Why should we take him seriously? I'm going to ignore him, they'll say 'THE PRESIDENT IS SO PRESIDENTIAL' and our ratings will soar. Just watch. We're going to Keep America Great by IGNORING this clown!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80183, "fields": { "question": 80182, "description": "I'll go after his record in New Jersey. He has continuously sided with the establishment, and he uh, continues to ruin New Jersey with his so-called 'bi-partisan' agenda. Hammer him on it. Don' t worry Donald, I have this under control." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80185, "fields": { "question": 80182, "description": "You know, before his life in politics, Baker did a lot of work in the health industry. He lost millions of dollars running these companies, and even fired people. He RAISED PREMIUMS on average, everyday Americans. I'm gonna hit him extensively on this, he's a scammer to the American people." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80187, "fields": { "question": 80182, "description": "Why aren’t they focusing on doing their jobs for their constituents in New Jersey and Massachusetts? All they want is power. I'll go with this. The more time they’re away from running their own states, the more it goes to our favor. They just want to say they were VP under the swamp. It's tragic, Donald." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80189, "fields": { "question": 80182, "description": "To be honest Donald, not much I can really do to attack them. Plus, we should act bipartisan in case we get a deadlock in Congress. I'll keep the attacks light, and focus on what unites us, rather than what divides us. We're gonna win this on messaging and branding Mr President." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80192, "fields": { "question": 80191, "description": "That's... That's not a bad idea, Donnie. The mainstream hates us, we both know that. We can make something out of this, embrace \"new media\" and dispel all the crackpot theories and whining newscasters. We just need to... prepare, badly. Find middle ground, and convince people that D.C. isn't totally engulfed in flames." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80194, "fields": { "question": 80191, "description": "We can go on Rogan, but he's gotta play by our rules. We can't look like we don't know what we're doing, we oughta send in some non-negotiables to his team. I've seen his clips before, he... he gets off topic easy. It's only showtime when his people agree he won't ask us about any- any bullshit, you know the stuff. No Aliens, no pyramids, no DMT." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80196, "fields": { "question": 80191, "description": "No- We'd... We'd look like jackasses, Donald. The American people are facing a never-before seen electoral outcome, dazed and confused, and the President and his VP are talking about weed to a guy that commentates the UFC? We need someone holding down the fort in D.C., bad. Tell you what, your better suited for a podcast... How about you hitch it down to Austin, and I'll stay here working with congress and the media." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80200, "fields": { "question": 80199, "description": "What? You want ME to go on MSDNC? Yeah, heh, that’d go really well, wouldn’t it! Are you mad? No chance in hell, we have it bad enough already with every other news anchor in America, I’m not going on “Madcows” show. I’m not being howled by the Fake News." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80201, "fields": { "question": 80199, "description": "Yeah, sure, I’ll pay them a visit, the people, they need to hear their President speak to them, y’know? I mean, surely it can’t go badly, right? I just hope that Scarborough or Maddow are at least GRACIOUS, but who am I kidding, they want me DEAD!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80204, "fields": { "question": 80199, "description": "Okay, okay, I’ll go, but you’re coming with me. If you’re there, they’ll go easy on me, plain and simple. I don’t get why they worship the ground you stand on, truly, I don’t, it’s a miracle! Regardless, if we both go, they’ll proclaim we’re the ‘best administration’, which we are, but the others don’t see our vision." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80206, "fields": { "question": 80199, "description": "Fine by me Bernard, fine by me, I’ve done this stuff for decades. They used to love me, the media I mean, they wanted me to do so many interviews, but since I’ve become President, they want me on the cross! I’ll do your little stunt, and I’ll come back bigger than ever, believe me." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80209, "fields": { "question": 80208, "description": "Damn it, unfortunately you might have a point there Donnie. I might not agree with him- ever... but Tucker's more reasonable than half the pundits the G.O.P.'s ever thrown at me. Give me a couple days to prepare, maybe we can sit down and have a nice talk." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80210, "fields": { "question": 80208, "description": "Well, you aren't wrong Donald. I want to show all these misguided souls that all I want to do is put more money in their pockets, and less to the billionaires. Maybe, dispel a bit of the guff about Socialism, Tucker would at least be understanding." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80211, "fields": { "question": 80208, "description": "Believe me Donny, I know the guy. I'll be honest, I've been wanting to knock that confused grin off his face for some time now. Let's set up a real debate- none of the poppy bullshit Fox usually does where they just scream over each other." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80215, "fields": { "question": 80208, "description": "Donny, I'm not willing to go on there and exert all my force in hopes a bunch of geezers like ourselves in rural Idaho will stop thinking I'm a communist-- it's a lost cause. I'm staying in DC, we're overloaded enough as is. Hell, maybe they'll like me more when the work we're put in the economy comes to fruition." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80218, "fields": { "question": 80217, "description": "This is the TRUTH about the little liar called Bernard Sanders, he is no champion of the people, but I am, Bernard is what you would call a lying little communist who wants to work with Winnie the Pooh and crazed Fat Man to RUIN America. I, however, am a true American patriot who will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN AS BERNARD, or as how I like to call him, BIG BAD BERNARD has ruined all my plans." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80223, "fields": { "question": 80222, "description": "Let’s court the Catholic and moderate vote with Joseph Biden, he’s a career politician and will help tie us closer to the establishment and the moderate vote with him. I know you guys are uh, skeptical of what I want to accomplish, so this is my olive branch. Take it or leave it.\n" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80225, "fields": { "question": 80222, "description": "We need someone to rally the progressives and who can be unapologetically themselves. I think Kamala Harris is the choice for that, a historic one at that. We need to, uh, mend the bridges with African American voters, they feel like I’ve let them down." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80227, "fields": { "question": 80222, "description": "Let’s get Catherine Cortez Mastro, she’s got credentials as Senator for Nevada and will help our chances with Latino folk. We have to push our, uh, agenda to the Southwest. Expand the map in a way, this’ll be our best shot." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80229, "fields": { "question": 80222, "description": "What about Klobuchar? She’s a good choice for the Midwest, she’s got strong ties to the moderate wing of the party, and is palatable to my base. We could make it work, and I’m gonna contact her to see if she’s interested." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80235, "fields": { "question": 80233, "description": "America, I believe that what we see in Minneapolis is the result of Trump’s America, with him caring more about himself, with him caring more about deporting every first, second and third generation immigrant back down South of the border rather than caring about the people. It’s a disgraceful act unbecoming of a President." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80710, "fields": { "question": 80707, "description": "We can label Trump as the chaos candidate. We can easily direct the conversation." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80711, "fields": { "question": 80707, "description": "I think this will be a good time to rally key Democratic figures to try and organise the campaign, using this time to tour from coast to coast and bring the fight to Trump. We can easily direct the conversation." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80739, "fields": { "question": 80727, "description": "I think this will be a good time to rally key Democratic figures to try and organise the campaign, using this time to tour from coast to coast and bring the fight to Trump. We’re gonna match how many rallies he does and more, and bring up everything he’s done wrong. America needs to wake up." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80743, "fields": { "question": 80727, "description": "This is blatant corruption and a dangerous misuse of Presidential power. I’m going to call for him to resign or be impeached, it’s the only way. We’re going to rally the base and make sure people know Trump is a fraud." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80748, "fields": { "question": 80747, "description": " Okay, is this what he’s really doing? Seriously? We need to energize the youth by pushing this throughout social media, and videos slamming his COVID response and his inaction to do anything regarding American lives. It’s a disgraceful act unbecoming of a President." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80756, "fields": { "question": 80747, "description": "We can label Trump as the chaos candidate. Chaos with COVID-19, chaos with policy, he has no real direction. Let’s contrast it with our clear-cut approach to how we’ll handle the virus. We can easily direct the conversation." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80759, "fields": { "question": 80747, "description": "I think this will be a good time to rally key Democratic figures to try and organise the campaign, using this time to tour from coast to coast and bring the fight to Trump. America needs to wake up." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80783, "fields": { "question": 80767, "description": "This is blatant corruption and a dangerous misuse of Presidential power. I’m going to call for him to resign or be impeached, it’s the only way. We’re going to rally the base and make sure people know Trump is a fraud." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80788, "fields": { "question": 80787, "description": "The passing of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg is a tremendous loss to our country. She was an extraordinary champion of justice and equal rights, and will be remembered as one of the great justices in modern American history. Unfortunately, we’ve already heard tonight from Sen. McConnell that he has decided to go against Justice Ginsburg’s dying wishes and violate his own past statements in order to bring a judge nominated by President Trump to the floor of the United States Senate." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80792, "fields": { "question": 80791, "description": "May the best man win…" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80795, "fields": { "question": 80791, "description": "To God we pray…" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80798, "fields": { "question": 80791, "description": "Trump won’t attend anyways, there’s no point…" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80801, "fields": { "question": 80791, "description": "For the nation's future…" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80805, "fields": { "question": 80804, "description": "Well, nothing will show my health but my campaign, let’s rally more, get out across the country and commit to a heavier schedule. I think I should take my trips to New Hampshire all through to New Jersey, we have to show we’re committed." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80812, "fields": { "question": 80804, "description": "Well, nothing will show my health but my campaign, let’s rally more, get out across the country and commit to a heavier schedule. Let me travel across the Southeast, places like Florida and Georgia. I’m gonna prove myself out there." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80818, "fields": { "question": 80804, "description": "Let’s play it all well and safe, let’s keep the campaign schedule as it is and hit up the Midwest, get some good tours, shake some hands and push through, we can win this no doubt." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80826, "fields": { "question": 80804, "description": "Well, I do look a bit old, so let’s try a healthier lifestyle, get in more daily jogs, do more, eat more greens and so one, along with taking a few days off, let me recoup whilst I adjust to this new routine." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80830, "fields": { "question": 80829, "description": "Well, nothing will show my health but my campaign, let’s rally more, get out across the country and commit to a heavier schedule. Usually, it is a demographic we easily relate to, so an endorsement from the NAACP should help us in the Black Belt and mend any sort of bridges with them. We need everyone onboard to stop authoritarianism." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80913, "fields": { "question": 80904, "description": "Look, we don’t have that good numbers with the religious folk, but they’re needed on our side. Let’s make overtures to Catholics, Protestants, hell, we need everyone. I’ll see if I can get some big endorsements." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80921, "fields": { "question": 80904, "description": "I know just the people. We need Unions. Specifically we need the endorsement of ALF-CIO. They say the working-class is fleeing the Democratic Party. I think it’s the Democratic Party fleeing the working-class. I will change that. Get me on the line with Teamsters as well." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80928, "fields": { "question": 80904, "description": "You know, the Latino vote is a well needed bloc for us, and they are quite socially conservative, it’s concerning that they’re heading towards the President. We need to stem the ‘bleeding’. Let’s do some rallies across the southern border, and get prominent Latino figures to join us." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80936, "fields": { "question": 80935, "description": "Look, we’ve been bleeding support from African-Americans ever since my nomination. Usually, it is a demographic we easily relate to, so an endorsement from the NAACP should help us in the Black Belt and mend any sort of bridges with them. We need everyone onboard to stop authoritarianism." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 80944, "fields": { "question": 80935, "description": "Look, we don’t have that good numbers with the religious folk, but they’re needed on our side. We need to stem the ‘bleeding’. Let’s do some rallies across the southern border, and get prominent Latino figures to join us." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81023, "fields": { "question": 81022, "description": "What? They want me to be a lame duck for 4 years? Are you kidding me? Listen- I- this is outrageous. First I was lied to in 2016, and now that I’ve won fairly, they want to limit what I can do? This is stupid, and I’m not going to do that. They can either get aboard my plan for America, or they can be left behind in the agenda. We have a General Election to fight, and I can’t win it with senior figures of the Democratic Party breathing down my neck, tell them to get with the plan and to have all hands on deck." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81026, "fields": { "question": 81022, "description": "I’m going to do an address at the Naval Observatory. People deserve to know the truth. If I win the next election, I will only serve as a one-term President. For too long, the political elite have kept power centralised at the top, keeping those who’ve been with them for decades hold all the power. It’s time for a new generation of leaders, those who will bring America together, not divide it. A new generation of leaders who can inspire and bring HOPE. If we win, we’re going to get as much done as possible within our time frame. It’s time Americans get honesty." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81032, "fields": { "question": 81031, "description": "What? They want me to be a lame duck for 4 years? Are you kidding me? Listen- I- this is outrageous. First I was lied to in 2016, and now that I’ve won fairly, they want to limit what I can do? This is stupid, and I’m not going to do that. They can either get aboard my plan for America, or they can be left behind in the agenda. We have a General Election to fight, and I can’t win it with senior figures of the Democratic Party breathing down my neck, tell them to get with the plan and to have all hands on deck." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81036, "fields": { "question": 81031, "description": "I’m going to do an address at the Naval Observatory. It’s time Americans get honesty." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81059, "fields": { "question": 81058, "description": "Well, a tour of the Middle East could be nice, I may not support these autocratic governments, but a tour could help with the Arab vote, along with allowing me to call my continued support for the Two-State solution. We’re going to put pressure on Israel." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81060, "fields": { "question": 81058, "description": "Let’s go to Europe! Britain, France and Germany are our traditional allies, so it would make sense to visit Johnson, Macron and Merkel in a good tour, it can help with our image and give some good press. We can bring back real diplomacy back on the world stage and upend Trump’s isolationist agenda." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81067, "fields": { "question": 81058, "description": "East Asia! Japan and Korea are some great allies in the midst of the Chinese Sphere, so it would be no harm to visit them for a tour, plus it could help with building our relationships further and curbing Chinese influence within the region. It’s time to see Shinzo." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81071, "fields": { "question": 81058, "description": "Let’s play it safe, you know. Covid is still out on the loose, so instead, we should spend this time visiting as many states as possible, from coast to coast, city to city. We need to get out there and actually speak to people." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81076, "fields": { "question": 81075, "description": "Well, a tour of the Middle East could be nice, I may not support these autocratic governments, but a tour could help with the Arab vote, along with allowing me to call my continued support for the Two-State solution. It’s time to see Shinzo." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81122, "fields": { "question": 81109, "description": "Let’s play it safe, you know. Covid is still out on the loose, so instead, we should spend this time visiting as many states as possible, from coast to coast, city to city. We need to get out there and actually speak to people." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81127, "fields": { "question": 81126, "description": "I believe we need to be sincere about this, Covid is no joke, and as much as I dislike Trump, Covid is not something you wish on those you dislike, so we should go out to Philadelphia with our masks up and talk about the seriousness of Covid. Let’s make sure people know our stance." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81131, "fields": { "question": 81126, "description": "We need to act calm, embody stability and urge caution and promote mask usage. We also need to go on the attack, otherwise we’ll be sitting ducks. Let’s critique Trump on his response to Covid and his lack of action." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81133, "fields": { "question": 81126, "description": "It might be harsh, it might be rude, but we need to hit Trump hard on this, show him we mean business. Obviously, it’s awful what’s happened, but if he had prepared for this, maybe it would not have happened. We need to listen to the medical experts." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81142, "fields": { "question": 81141, "description": "I believe we need to be sincere about this, Covid is no joke, and as much as I dislike Trump, Covid is not something you wish on those you dislike, so we should go out to Philadelphia with our masks up and talk about the seriousness of Covid. Let’s make sure people know our stance." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81146, "fields": { "question": 81141, "description": "We need to act calm, embody stability and urge caution and promote mask usage. We also need to go on the attack, otherwise we’ll be sitting ducks. Let’s critique Trump on his response to Covid and his lack of action." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81163, "fields": { "question": 81154, "description": "It might be harsh, it might be rude, but we need to hit Trump hard on this, show him we mean business. Obviously, it’s awful what’s happened, but if he had prepared for this, maybe it would not have happened. We need to listen to the medical experts." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81168, "fields": { "question": 81167, "description": "I believe we need to be sincere about this, Covid is no joke, and as much as I dislike Trump, Covid is not something you wish on those you dislike, so we should go out to Philadelphia with our masks up and talk about the seriousness of Covid. Let’s make sure people know our stance." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81172, "fields": { "question": 81167, "description": "We need to act calm, embody stability and urge caution and promote mask usage. We also need to go on the attack, otherwise we’ll be sitting ducks. Let’s critique Trump on his response to Covid and his lack of action." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81176, "fields": { "question": 81167, "description": "It might be harsh, it might be rude, but we need to hit Trump hard on this, show him we mean business. Obviously, it’s awful what’s happened, but if he had prepared for this, maybe it would not have happened. We need to listen to the medical experts." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81181, "fields": { "question": 81180, "description": "Let us go on a tour from Miami to Portland, Maine. The Eastern seaboard is looking a little swingy in the south, and a nice Heritage tour from Brooklyn to Burlington will be nice, the weather is good this time of year for it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81192, "fields": { "question": 81180, "description": "The Midwest will be nice to visit to keep them as our ‘Blue Wall’ so to speak. Let’s travel from Philadelphia to Chicago we’ll go, with pit stops in Detroit and Cincinnati. We have a real chance here, I can feel it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81209, "fields": { "question": 81180, "description": "The southwest is very tight right now, and we need to pour everything into Nevada, Arizona and Texas. We might be shooting for stars with Texas, but a tour from Houston to Vegas won’t hurt, so let’s go at it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81217, "fields": { "question": 81180, "description": "Lets go bold, the Plains might be able to fall in line if we give a nudge, especially Montana, so why not have a nice whistle-stop tour there, go talk to the locals, get on a ranch and so on. I can feel it in my bones, we’re going to make waves. Let’s Make America Feel The Bern!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81224, "fields": { "question": 81223, "description": "“America, it is with my deepest sorrow to inform you that Donald John Trump, the 45th President of the United States, is dead. The President and I might not have agreed on much, but deep down, I think he was a good man, and one that was treated unfairly. And as I take up the mantle of the Presidency, I will ensure that he will be honoured. Our nation mourns. No one deserves to die like that. May he rest in peace. May God bless America, and may God bless Donald John Trump.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81228, "fields": { "question": 81227, "description": "Do I even need to acknowledge this? I’ll have these traitors on a leash in no time. Haley, Hawley, Kinzinger, they’ll all bend the knee to me, regardless of whether or not I show up to these debates. Obviously, I mean, people would love to see me, but they can’t, not yet anyways!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81229, "fields": { "question": 81227, "description": "These frauds, why do they want to attack me, their favorite President? They better fall in line, otherwise I will curb stomp them into the dirt. They have NO idea of what I am capable of. Bannon, get me on the line with the RNC, I’m heading to these debates." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81234, "fields": { "question": 81227, "description": "Okay, fine, listen, these suckers have no idea what’s going to hit them. Bannon, Rogers, put the ads live NOW. They’re going to regret the day they tried to cross paths with me. Pathetic morons, next time they better fall behind and give me 100% LOYALTY!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81238, "fields": { "question": 81227, "description": "I’m going to stick to my very wonderful, very positive record. They have no idea, they’re gonna think I’m going to be super tough, which I am, but I’m going to stay positive. The people, they’ll love it, and they’ll say how I’m so ‘presidential’. Amazing plans, maybe the best ever?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81242, "fields": { "question": 81241, "description": "Someone just like me! She’s a real conservative warrior. Sarah Palin has been beat down by big government stopping true patriots like ME from ***Making America Great Again***. She has my total endorsement, she’s a very strong, very capable woman who can energize our beautiful women. She may have lost in 2008, but forgive and forget, y’know!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81246, "fields": { "question": 81241, "description": " Listen, okay, Little Marco Rubio is up there, but I mean, who wants to work with that loser? I’m more than happy, I mean, he’ll bend to my whim, which I suppose has it’s merits. Okay, okay, he can help me, but he has to tow my line, not his." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81250, "fields": { "question": 81241, "description": "Cruz? Are you kidding me? What a fraud, I mean, Lyin’ Ted. Complete freakshow, but okay, he might be needed, but still, this guy, I mean, was against me since day 1! Why should I pick him? He almost lost in ‘18 to some gun-control freak. Okay, okay, I’ll choose him, but I don’t like him, at all." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81254, "fields": { "question": 81241, "description": "Do I really have this guy on my list? Kemp? He’s a total bore, a RINO and someone who has a lack of respect for TRUMP. But the Republicans, they can’t help unless I pick this guy. I fucking wrote the Art of the Deal and I’m left with this? What a joke. Can you believe it?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81259, "fields": { "question": 81258, "description": "Hey, well let’s get our pockets full, every dime counts to drown the piggy, so call up my Wall Street friends, they’ll listen to me and hear me through. If they don’t? Well, I’m more than happy to expose those little ties. They won’t know what hit em." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81263, "fields": { "question": 81258, "description": "I can self-fund. I did it 4 years ago, I can do it now. Bernie may have the small dollars, but I have the big dollars, and nothing compares to that. It’ll be almost TOO EASY?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81266, "fields": { "question": 81258, "description": "You know what? Let’s beat Crazy Bernard at his own game. He can’t win at anything, you see, little Bernie here is only dominating the grassroots as he’s the only one doing it! Once I start, oh, well, he’s gonna get pummeled! I won’t let our country be destroyed by them." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81573, "fields": { "question": 81571, "description": "Listen- okay, fine, we’ll give the people what they want. He has no idea what he’s doing, he’ll bow to me, as he did beforehand." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81640, "fields": { "question": 81639, "description": "As much as I appreciate the gesture - no way in HELL am I joining the Republicans. They are the complete opposite to my beliefs. And I'd rather be an independent anyways Don. Listen, I think going independent is the way to go. Both the Democrats and Republicans in congress despise both you and me. We're the devil to them. Let's play that to our advantage." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81644, "fields": { "question": 81639, "description": "The sentiment is there Donald, and I think there would be a significant chance a large section of the population would follow us, but I also have my doubts about getting the nomination for VP in a Republican field and you for the Democrats, I'm certainly no Joe Lieberman and neither are you. You, and you only, can secure my place in this administration, if you so wish." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81648, "fields": { "question": 81639, "description": "Congressional Democrats and Republicans hate us both, we're unpopular within large sections of the population and our agenda is crumbling. We need a rebrand. We need a new party. Whether it survives without us or not doesn't matter, but we need one now." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81687, "fields": { "question": 81639, "description": "We should stick to what we currently have. We have bipartisan credentials, and I'm confident that we can secure our nominations through whatever means. Now whether or not the RNC and DNC allows it is a different question, but we must stand firm." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81691, "fields": { "question": 81690, "description": "I’m not leaving New York. It’s my home. Are you kidding me? This will always be my one true home, I was raised here, and I’m not leaving it, believe me. I will always represent the Empire State." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81697, "fields": { "question": 81690, "description": "Okay, well, I suppose a move is in order. Maybe to New Jersey? Kripsy Christie would be more than happy to have me over, and besides, it’s been shifting right ever since I won. Crazy Bernard won’t see it coming. It’ll be beautiful." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81702, "fields": { "question": 81701, "description": "Crazy Bernard? Seriously? He’s a lunatic. Just look at him, his hair, the way he presents himself. He isn’t presidential, he’s a demented man dressed up in a suit. Me on the other hand? I’m a stable genius, the smartest President, and perhaps the most successful President, maybe ever?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81707, "fields": { "question": 81701, "description": "I’m going to run positive, listen, Sanders can try and call me an ‘ENEMY TO DEMOCRACY’ all he wants, frankly, I don’t care. Everyone knows he’s exaggerating, it’s why no one can take him seriously. I have my accomplishments. What does he have? Oh right…" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81711, "fields": { "question": 81701, "description": "He’s deluded in self-fantasy, I mean, where’s the money going to come from? He wants free EVERYTHING. I mean- thats’ not how you run an economy. I’m a businessman, I know how to do this, and I have for the past 4 years. I’m telling you folks, he doesn’t understand my world. He’s toast." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81717, "fields": { "question": 81701, "description": "He’s a hypocrite, plain and simple. Remember that newspaper he wrote in? I am saddened to hear that." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81790, "fields": { "question": 81789, "description": "It’s obvious, I’ll win, do I even need to prepare? Total loser, can’t get his stories straight, and a hypocrite!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81794, "fields": { "question": 81789, "description": "It’s obvious, I’ll win bigly, I mean, I’ll prepare for a bit, but seriously, do I really need to when the communist is bleeding support? Better dead than red!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81799, "fields": { "question": 81789, "description": "It’s clear as day, I’ll win, so much so that I’m going to prepare like hell. Not that I need to or anything, but just in case. Sanders will try his hardest to lambast me. What a moron. Doesn’t he see the vision? We’re Making America Greater." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81804, "fields": { "question": 81789, "description": "Who needs the debates? They’re rigged by those elitists, the media, CNN, MSDNC, the news anchors, all against me. Is it any wonder Sanders is cozying up? What a sore loser. He used to be on the same tune I was, but ever since he’s been coddled by the media, he’s switched up! I’m not debating a fraud and a hypocrite." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81810, "fields": { "question": 81809, "description": "I know where to go. Israel. They love me over there, I’ve stood with them since day 1, unlike those phonies Obamna and Sleepy Joe. They know I’m a real champion for them, and frankly, they owe me, big time!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81815, "fields": { "question": 81809, "description": "People think I hate NATO, which is simply not true. Frankly, I love NATO, and NATO love me! They can’t get enough, because I upped them all to 2%. Don’t they know that? We’re going to continue this tremendous work and bring together a very strong, very willing coalition." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81819, "fields": { "question": 81809, "description": "Why should I take away myself from America? They need me now, they need their leader at home. I’m going to use this time to campaign so strongly, that the Democrats won’t know what hit em. It’ll be tremendous, just watch!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81821, "fields": { "question": 81809, "description": "Take me to Japan. Abe misses me so dearly, it’s true! MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81950, "fields": { "question": 81944, "description": "No way in hell am I ceding ground. Are you kidding me? They’ll slaughter me out there. What a joke. Listen, okay, I’ll wear masks and all that stuff, but I won’t stop campaigning, believe me, the people need to see me, my rallies. They need it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81954, "fields": { "question": 81944, "description": "Our people, the base, they still need to see me, my rallies. We’re doing it online. Fuck it, we’ll do it live, y’know, O’Reilly style. People will eat it up, we can go from topic to topic, we’ll be unstoppable. Sanders won’t know what hit em!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81959, "fields": { "question": 81944, "description": "Okay, okay, I’ll stop campaigning for a bit. I can’t keep doing this, especially in my condition. I may be the fittest President of all time, but we all have our limitations! Sanders, frankly, should be doing the same, otherwise he’s a cheat." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81964, "fields": { "question": 81963, "description": "Covid is a hoax. This nonsense won’t stop me, believe me, come November, a RED WAVE will storm Washington. MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81969, "fields": { "question": 81963, "description": "No way in hell am I ceding ground. Are you kidding me? They’ll slaughter me out there. What a joke. Listen, okay, I’ll wear masks and all that stuff, but I won’t stop campaigning, believe me, the people need to see me, my rallies. They need it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81973, "fields": { "question": 81963, "description": "Our people, the base, they still need to see me, my rallies. We’re doing it online. Fuck it, we’ll do it live, y’know, O’Reilly style. People will eat it up, we can go from topic to topic, we’ll be unstoppable. Sanders won’t know what hit em!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81978, "fields": { "question": 81963, "description": "Okay, okay, I’ll stop campaigning for a bit. I can’t keep doing this, especially in my condition. I may be the fittest President of all time, but we all have our limitations! Sanders, frankly, should be doing the same, otherwise he’s a cheat." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81983, "fields": { "question": 81982, "description": "“It is with my deepest sorrow to tell you that Donald J Trump, 45th president of the United States, is dead. Donald was more than just a president, he was a loving father, a businessman, but most of all: an American. He knew what it was like to be a patriot of this country, to stand with it through thick and thin. He saw where this country was heading and intervened. That’s why he became President. It is saddening to see that he has now passed. May he Rest in Peace and may God Bless his family and the United States of America.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81988, "fields": { "question": 81987, "description": "“It is with my deepest sorrow to tell you that Donald J Trump, 45th president of the United States, is dead. Donald was more than just a president, he was a loving father, a businessman, but most of all: an American. He knew what it was like to be a patriot of this country, to stand with it through thick and thin. He saw where this country was heading and intervened. That’s why he became President. It is saddening to see that he has now passed. May he Rest in Peace and may God Bless his family and the United States of America.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81993, "fields": { "question": 81992, "description": "“It is with my deepest sorrow to tell you that Donald J Trump, 45th president of the United States, is dead. Donald was more than just a president, he was a loving father, a businessman, but most of all: an American. He knew what it was like to be a patriot of this country, to stand with it through thick and thin. He saw where this country was heading and intervened. That’s why he became President. It is saddening to see that he has now passed. May he Rest in Peace and may God Bless his family and the United States of America.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 81998, "fields": { "question": 81997, "description": "“It is with my deepest sorrow to tell you that Donald J Trump, 45th president of the United States, is dead. Donald was more than just a president, he was a loving father, a businessman, but most of all: an American. He knew what it was like to be a patriot of this country, to stand with it through thick and thin. He saw where this country was heading and intervened. That’s why he became President. It is saddening to see that he has now passed. May he Rest in Peace and may God Bless his family and the United States of America.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 82003, "fields": { "question": 82002, "description": " The Midwest is very Bernie this year, with Ohio and Iowa swinging Bernie, a trip over there could flip them back. Then the obvious trip to Pennsylvania. I’ll call up Bernie, wish him luck and then pray." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 82008, "fields": { "question": 82002, "description": "The South is in a bad position, with Texas, North Carolina and especially Georgia looking shaky, if we want to keep the south solidly red, we need to pop on over there to keep it red." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 82013, "fields": { "question": 82002, "description": "The Industrial Midwest states of Michigan, Wisconsin, Illinois and Pennsylvania are all Bernie land, if we want to win, and win bigly, we need to catch them, hook, line, and sinker." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 82019, "fields": { "question": 82002, "description": "Let’s set up a final ad campaign in the last stretch of the campaign, and meet up with Bernie, as for all our differences, we still all are children of God, and Bernie is a good man." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 82173, "fields": { "question": 82147, "description": "Well - the answer’s obvious. We're gonna endorse our new party. REBIRTH will STORM Congress. It'll be a landslide victory Bernard - TRUST ME! The establishment, for too long, has warred against us. Now it's time we fight back. FOR THE COUNTRY!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 82256, "fields": { "question": 79670, "description": "We need to bring the fight to them, we have our disagreements, but you're right, the Republicans, and to an extent, the Democrats, are uniting against us because of our respective movements. Fight fire with fire." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 82309, "fields": { "question": 80217, "description": "I don’t know why you want to become a cog in the machine, Bernard, but I guess you can go do that, I don’t need you." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 82365, "fields": { "question": 79670, "description": "This is a great sort of opportunity Mr President, Angus has little recognition outside of Maine, and, well, Mitt Romney is known as a 'loser' as you so described him. Let me focus on the positive messaging, we all know you, uh, love to attack." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 82401, "fields": { "question": 79670, "description": "This is a battle between the populist movement we have built up, and the establishment trying to crack down on it. We cannot lose, the people of this country rely on us. We need to act - fast." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 85055, "fields": { "question": 79778, "description": "You know, what’s interesting about John ‘1 for 50’ Kasich, is, he’s from Ohio, a terrific state with many strong, powerful unions, but he hates them! Tried to destroy them with his Right To Work For Less law. But our beautiful firefighters and police unions, they beat him in Ohio. And so will we! We love our WORKERS!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 85092, "fields": { "question": 79778, "description": "We should be looking into, frankly, Bloomberg’s personal affairs. I used to be a friend of his and of course I’ve heard things before from Graydon about his wandering hands. Mike ‘Stop and Frisk’ Bloomberg, we used to call him. You wouldn’t wanna be alone in an office with him, all I’m saying." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 85129, "fields": { "question": 79778, "description": "I find it truly disgraceful that the lying, Fake News media accuses me of being a King and Dictator, when Mike Bloomberg REWROTE the constitution of New York City and spent millions to give himself a THIRD TERM! Never been done before! We’re going to look into the Dark Money very strongly. After we defeat him, of course." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88001, "fields": { "question": 80053, "description": "I know Clinton, I know Booker, let me deal with that Donald, maybe we can come to an informal truce? As for you with the Republicans, well, we know your style, but maybe we can keep the atmosphere positive? It could come in handy." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88152, "fields": { "question": 80053, "description": "We need to figure out a plan Mr President, they may be disunited, but we’re going to have to fight on two fronts. This could spell disaster for us. If you let me focus on those ‘RINO’ Republicans, and you go after Clinton, does that sound fine with you?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88303, "fields": { "question": 80053, "description": "We could, uh, keep it positive Donald, let’s be honest, these parties have been at it for decades. They won’t give it up now. We have our accomplishments, let’s bring it home for our movement, and stay above the fray. It might take time, but we have to give it a try." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88457, "fields": { "question": 88456, "description": "Alright, uh, let's see here...I'll stick to my points, bring out the charisma, and keep it brief. I won't be seen as some attack dog by the press, I need composure. I've got time to prepare, and uh, well, hopefully not face the worst of it..." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88460, "fields": { "question": 88456, "description": "Deflect, Attack, Defend. That shall be my strategy. The Establishment will try and throw everything at me, but I'll hold my ground. I won't falter, don't worry Donald." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88463, "fields": { "question": 88456, "description": "This is a battle for the dignity of our nation. We cannot falter in the face of the Establishment. We draw the line here. I'll hammer home our accomplishments and stay above the fray." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88466, "fields": { "question": 88456, "description": "I'll just wing it, it'll be okay." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88470, "fields": { "question": 88469, "description": "Alright, uh, let's see here...I'll stick to my points, bring out the charisma, and keep it brief. I won't be seen as some attack dog by the press, I need composure. I've got time to prepare, and uh, well, hopefully not face the worst of it..." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88473, "fields": { "question": 88469, "description": "Deflect, Attack, Defend. That shall be my strategy. The Establishment will try and throw everything at me, but I'll hold my ground. I won't falter, don't worry Donald." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88476, "fields": { "question": 88469, "description": "This is a battle for the dignity of our nation. We cannot falter in the face of the Establishment. We draw the line here. I'll hammer home our accomplishments and stay above the fray." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88479, "fields": { "question": 88469, "description": "I'll just wing it, it'll be okay." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88483, "fields": { "question": 88482, "description": "Alright, uh, let's see here...I'll stick to my points, bring out the charisma, and keep it brief. I won't be seen as some attack dog by the press, I need composure. I've got time to prepare, and uh, well, hopefully not face the worst of it..." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88486, "fields": { "question": 88482, "description": "Deflect, Attack, Defend. That shall be my strategy. The Establishment will try and throw everything at me, but I'll hold my ground. I won't falter, don't worry Donald." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88489, "fields": { "question": 88482, "description": "This is a battle for the dignity of our nation. We cannot falter in the face of the Establishment. We draw the line here. I'll hammer home our accomplishments and stay above the fray." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88492, "fields": { "question": 88482, "description": "I'll just wing it, it'll be okay." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88501, "fields": { "question": 80043, "description": "The DEMOCROOKS and the REPUBLICANTS falling apart against our wonderful, and frankly, AMAZING administration? This is so sad, beyond even parody itself! These LOSERS can't do anything themselves anymore. The UNIPARTY is toast." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88644, "fields": { "question": 80043, "description": "These people won't have any idea of how to run our beautiful country. Mayor Pete, who ruined South Bend's roads and bridges, WHICH I HELPED FUND, and then poor old Haley, trying to stay relevant! SAD! These people couldn't run their states or cities, let alone the GREATEST COUNTRY on Earth!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer", "pk": 88787, "fields": { "question": 80043, "description": "Should we even campaign at this point, Bernie? These guys are total whack-jobs, I mean, why should we even give them airtime? These guys are FRAUDS, plain and simple. The public, the AMERICAN PEOPLE know a fraud when they see one. We're going to stomp them Bernard, trust me." } } ]; campaignTrail_temp.states_json = [ { "model": "campaign_trail.state", "pk": 1100, "fields": { "name": "Alabama", "abbr": "AL", "electoral_votes": "campaign_trail.answer_score_state", "pk": 88938, "fields": { "answer": 85055, "state": 1104, "candidate": 301, "affected_candidate": 50001, "state_multiplier": 0.1 } }, { "model":
