Safe to say, he doesn’t want to talk anymore." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80390, "fields": { "answer": 80357, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "It seems like this campaign was somewhat successful, bringing you enough money to hold you over for a good while, so no cuts for anything is needed really, so that’s a relief for your campaign, and hey, you have a small surplus too! You use what little extra funds you have to produce a hit piece of Trump. Safe to say, he doesn’t want to talk anymore." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80391, "fields": { "answer": 80358, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "It seems like this campaign was somewhat successful, bringing you enough money to hold you over for a good while, so no cuts for anything is needed really, so that’s a relief for your campaign, and hey, you have a small surplus too! You use what little extra funds you have to produce a hit piece of Trump. Safe to say, he doesn’t want to talk anymore." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80573, "fields": { "answer": 80287, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "The moderates have fallen back into the fold, and the speech, to you, hit just the right notes, it seems like you have a decent lead over Trump. The march of progress must start once more. Hopefully it won’t be another 2016." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80646, "fields": { "answer": 80387, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You don’t want to forget those who supported you all those years ago, so you make a 5 minute YouTube video passionately praising your earliest supporters. Your staffers say it went viral, and you can feel it as you travel the country. The momentum is officially behind your campaign as you continue to make short videos detailing policy. #FeelTheBern soon begins trending." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80647, "fields": { "answer": 80388, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You don’t want to forget those who supported you all those years ago, so you make a 5 minute YouTube video passionately praising your earliest supporters. The momentum is officially behind your campaign as you continue to make short videos detailing policy. #FeelTheBern soon begins trending." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80649, "fields": { "answer": 80381, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You don’t want to forget those who supported you all those years ago, so you make a 5 minute YouTube video passionately praising your earliest supporters. Your staffers say it went viral, and you can feel it as you travel the country. The momentum is officially behind your campaign as you continue to make short videos detailing policy. #FeelTheBern soon begins trending." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80666, "fields": { "answer": 80665, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You tour the Midwest, doing this style of fundraising and it helps a good bit in terms of polling there, but it doesn’t help in terms of fundraising, as you're barely afloat to keep your campaign alive. The coffers begin to empty, and soon, you’re gonna have to pull away from events. As much as you enjoy doing this, you soon see the writing on the wall." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80704, "fields": { "answer": 80696, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You tour the Midwest, doing this style of fundraising and it helps a good bit in terms of polling there, but it doesn’t help in terms of fundraising, as your barely afloat to keep your campaign alive. The coffers begin to empty, and soon, you’re gonna have to pull away from events. As much as you enjoy doing this, you soon see the writing on the wall." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80705, "fields": { "answer": 80687, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You tour the Midwest, doing this style of fundraising and it helps a good bit in terms of polling there, but it doesn’t help in terms of fundraising, as your barely afloat to keep your campaign alive. The coffers begin to empty, and soon, you’re gonna have to pull away from events. As much as you enjoy doing this, you soon see the writing on the wall." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80706, "fields": { "answer": 80681, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You tour the Midwest, doing this style of fundraising and it helps a good bit in terms of polling there, but it doesn’t help in terms of fundraising, as your barely afloat to keep your campaign alive. The coffers begin to empty, and soon, you’re gonna have to pull away from events. As much as you enjoy doing this, you soon see the writing on the wall." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80709, "fields": { "answer": 80708, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Your appeal to the youth hasn’t gone unnoticed, especially considering turnout will be higher this election due to mailing in ballots. However, some staffers note that you do need to do more for other demographics - and polling is showing a slight shift from more older voters, which you’ll need to keep in mind." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80713, "fields": { "answer": 80710, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You believe this is a fool-proof plan, and to some extent, it works. You’re definitely seen as the more approachable and ‘nice’ candidate, but whether or not people want that is a different thing. You sit in the Naval Observatory wondering whether this whole fight is even worth it. But you do it - for your country." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80714, "fields": { "answer": 80711, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "This tour goes quite well really, with Democrats of all stripes, from California Liberals to the Midwestern Moderates condemning Trump on his behaviour, this was a good point to use and rally the nation around, with the public consensus favouring you." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80715, "fields": { "answer": 80712, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Trump was successfully acquitted in the Senate. You felt hopeless. All that maneuvering, just for him to stay in office. He later gloats that ‘Crazy Bernie’ stood no chance. Still, it’s a disdain on his record, being the only President to be impeached twice. You almost feel proud of that fact." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80729, "fields": { "answer": 80728, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Your appeal to the youth hasn’t gone unnoticed, especially considering turnout will be higher this election due to mailing in ballots. However, some staffers note that you do need to do more for other demographics - and polling is showing a slight shift from more older voters, which you’ll need to keep in mind." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80737, "fields": { "answer": 80736, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You believe this is a fool-proof plan, and to some extent, it works. You’re definitely seen as the more approachable and ‘nice’ candidate, but whether or not people want that is a different thing. You sit in the Naval Observatory wondering whether this whole fight is even worth it. But you do it - for your country." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80740, "fields": { "answer": 80739, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "This tour goes quite well really, with Democrats of all stripes, from California Liberals to the Midwestern Moderates condemning Trump on his behaviour, this was a good point to use and rally the nation around, with the public consensus favouring you." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80744, "fields": { "answer": 80743, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Trump was successfully acquitted in the Senate. You felt hopeless. All that maneuvering, just for him to stay in office. He later gloats that ‘Crazy Bernie’ stood no chance. You almost feel proud of that fact." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80749, "fields": { "answer": 80748, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Your appeal to the youth hasn’t gone unnoticed, especially considering turnout will be higher this election due to mailing in ballots. You’re definitely seen as the more approachable and ‘nice’ candidate, but whether or not people want that is a different thing. You felt hopeless. All that maneuvering, just for him to stay in office. He later gloats that ‘Crazy Bernie’ stood no chance. Still, it’s a disdain on his record, being the only President to be impeached twice. You almost feel proud of that fact." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80769, "fields": { "answer": 80768, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Your appeal to the youth hasn’t gone unnoticed, especially considering turnout will be higher this election due to mailing in ballots. However, some staffers note that you do need to do more for other demographics - and polling is showing a slight shift from more older voters, which you’ll need to keep in mind." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80777, "fields": { "answer": 80776, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You believe this is a fool-proof plan, and to some extent, it works. You’re definitely seen as the more approachable and ‘nice’ candidate, but whether or not people want that is a different thing. You sit in the Naval Observatory wondering whether this whole fight is even worth it. But you do it - for your country." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80780, "fields": { "answer": 80779, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "This tour goes quite well really, with Democrats of all stripes, from California Liberals to the Midwestern Moderates condemning Trump on his behaviour, this was a good point to use and rally the nation around, with the public consensus favouring you." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80784, "fields": { "answer": 80783, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Trump was successfully acquitted in the Senate. You felt hopeless. All that maneuvering, just for him to stay in office. He later gloats that ‘Crazy Bernie’ stood no chance. Still, it’s a disdain on his record, being the only President to be impeached twice. You almost feel proud of that fact." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80789, "fields": { "answer": 80788, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "A sucker punch. You do everything in your power to stop the nomination process, asking Democrat colleagues to delay it for as long as possible. Trump goes with the ultra-conservative Amy Coney Barrett, and only time will tell whether or not you’re able to block her ascension." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80793, "fields": { "answer": 80792, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "What a pathetic fool. He skipped. You stood there, going from point to point, while debating an empty stand. You even stood there for a few quiet minutes to let it sink in. You knew he was a fraud, but to skip debating you? You call him out as a ‘loser’, and he ends up ranting on Twitter." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80796, "fields": { "answer": 80795, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Trump attended. You were surprised considering his ‘VERY BUSY SCHEDULE’ which involved skipping COVID meetings and such. You looked him in the eyes, and you could see he didn’t want to be there. You felt like you had the cards for once, walloping him from point to point, causing an outburst so loud, even Fox News critiqued Trump on it. You say on twitter you won “Big League”." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80800, "fields": { "answer": 80798, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Neither of you attended, which dented both of your reputations, but you felt it hit you more. Why? He didn’t go either? Oh right, the media always put Democrats on a pedestal while Republicans get away with it. Frauds, you think, absolute frauds. Still, you use this valuable time to do a rally in New York, electrifying the crowds." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80803, "fields": { "answer": 80801, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Trump attended, and it seemed like you just weren’t on your game. How? Why? You seemed tired and dull, your staffers think you need a break, and you probably do. All this virus stuff, all the meetings, it got to you, and you weren’t able to effectively hold Trump to the fire." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80806, "fields": { "answer": 80805, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "It felt nice to be ‘back at home’ in a sense. You already feel better traversing through New England, making sure that your rallies are packed to the brim. As long as you’re happy with progress being made, and showing off that happiness, the media rumours dwindle. Finally, a breath of fresh air." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80813, "fields": { "answer": 80812, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Well, you get into a bit of a snag, having a few minor coughing fits here and there, not fully dispelling the rumours, but placating them, so decent job at it, but you still need to push those things out of view." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80825, "fields": { "answer": 80818, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Well, that was a train wreck, a real bad train wreck, alright, you got in some major coughing fits whilst there, even without beefing up your schedule, and it’s going to cost you dearly. Ouch." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80827, "fields": { "answer": 80826, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "It works I suppose, dispelling the rumours a good amount, but you had a golden opportunity here man, why waste it, but you do you I guess, after all, it seems to work all well and fine with you, so just hit up more policy for now, as the public is apathetic." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80831, "fields": { "answer": 80830, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "It felt nice to be ‘back at home’ in a sense. You already feel better traversing through New England, making sure that your rallies are packed to the brim. As long as you’re happy with progress being made, and showing off that happiness, the media rumours dwindle. Finally, a breath of fresh air." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80838, "fields": { "answer": 80837, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Well, you get into a bit of a snag, having a few minor coughing fits here and there, not fully dispelling the rumours, but placating them, so decent job at it, but you still need to push those things out of view." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80844, "fields": { "answer": 80843, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Well, that was a train wreck, a real bad train wreck, alright, you got in some major coughing fits whilst there, even without beefing up your schedule, and it’s going to cost you dearly. Ouch." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80902, "fields": { "answer": 80901, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "It works I suppose, dispelling the rumours a good amount, but you had a golden opportunity here man, why waste it, but you do you I guess, after all, it seems to work all well and fine with you, so just hit up more policy for now, as the public is apathetic." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80912, "fields": { "answer": 80905, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Well, it was touch and go for a moment, but seeing the threat from the President, the NAACP were more than happy to throw their weight behind you and your cause. This will undoubtedly give you a helping hand in the South, with your numbers trailing there. You can now look elsewhere to focus your agenda." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80918, "fields": { "answer": 80913, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "This doesn’t exactly ‘make waves’, but you start to see progress. The Blue Dogs in the South, weary of you, reluctantly endorse you, but other than that, nothing much comes off this. You worry if this was the wrong move." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80929, "fields": { "answer": 80928, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You go down to the Wall. You call it inhumane, and you say it is an injustice. Your people love it, your fight for justice, and it resonates with Hispanic people. You gain a slight uptick in their approval, although your social progressivism is a lot to take in. Keep that in mind." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80934, "fields": { "answer": 80921, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "It feels good to have your own turf secured. With the ALF-CIO happily endorsing you, you’re able to divert resources away from the ‘Blue Wall’ and invest in more battleground states. Your strategy seems to be paying off." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80937, "fields": { "answer": 80936, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Well, it was touch and go for a moment, but seeing the threat from the President, the NAACP were more than happy to throw their weight behind you and your cause. The Blue Dogs in the South, weary of you, reluctantly endorse you, but other than that, nothing much comes off this. You call it inhumane, and you say it is an injustice. Your people love it, your fight for justice, and it resonates with Hispanic people. You gain a slight uptick in their approval, although your social progressivism is a lot to take in. Keep that in mind." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 80995, "fields": { "answer": 80994, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Well, it was touch and go for a moment, but seeing the threat from the President, the NAACP were more than happy to throw their weight behind you and your cause. This will undoubtedly give you a helping hand in the South, with your numbers trailing there. You can now look elsewhere to focus your agenda." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81003, "fields": { "answer": 81002, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "This doesn’t exactly ‘make waves’, but you start to see progress. The Blue Dogs in the South, weary of you, reluctantly endorse you, but other than that, nothing much comes off this. You worry if this was the wrong move." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81009, "fields": { "answer": 81008, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "It feels good to have your own turf secured. With the ALF-CIO happily endorsing you, you’re able to divert resources away from the ‘Blue Wall’ and invest in more battleground states. Your strategy seems to be paying off." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81017, "fields": { "answer": 81016, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You go down to the Wall. You call it inhumane, and you say it is an injustice. Your people love it, your fight for justice, and it resonates with Hispanic people. You gain a slight uptick in their approval, although your social progressivism is a lot to take in. Keep that in mind." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81025, "fields": { "answer": 81023, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You’ve stood firm. You feel immense anger over what Democratic leadership have tried to do to you, but you keep it behind the scenes. If this even leaks once, your campaign is in tatters. Disunity not seen since the 60s. You carry on The Campaign Trail, but you always have what they said in the back of your mind. Traitors." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81028, "fields": { "answer": 81026, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Presidential. That’s what America saw tonight. Your address to America, delivered with passion and optimism, has indeed inspired Americans to finally begin looking ahead. It’s a tough road, and you don’t know the political implications right now, but from what your campaign staffers tell you, it’s a good vibe. You just hope it carries you to victory in November." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81033, "fields": { "answer": 81032, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You’ve stood firm. You feel immense anger over what Democratic leadership have tried to do to you, but you keep it behind the scenes. If this even leaks once, your campaign is in tatters. Disunity not seen since the 60s. You carry on The Campaign Trail, but you always have what they said in the back of your mind. Traitors." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81037, "fields": { "answer": 81036, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Presidential. That’s what America saw tonight. Your address to America, delivered with passion and optimism, has indeed inspired Americans to finally begin looking ahead. It’s a tough road, and you don’t know the political implications right now, but from what your campaign staffers tell you, it’s a good vibe. You just hope it carries you to victory in November." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81042, "fields": { "answer": 81041, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You’ve stood firm. You feel immense anger over what Democratic leadership have tried to do to you, but you keep it behind the scenes. If this even leaks once, your campaign is in tatters. Disunity not seen since the 60s. You carry on The Campaign Trail, but you always have what they said in the back of your mind. Traitors." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81046, "fields": { "answer": 81045, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Presidential. That’s what America saw tonight. It’s a tough road, and you don’t know the political implications right now, but from what your campaign staffers tell you, it’s a good vibe. You just hope it carries you to victory in November." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81051, "fields": { "answer": 81050, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You’ve stood firm. You feel immense anger over what Democratic leadership have tried to do to you, but you keep it behind the scenes. If this even leaks once, your campaign is in tatters. Disunity not seen since the 60s. You carry on The Campaign Trail, but you always have what they said in the back of your mind. Traitors." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81055, "fields": { "answer": 81054, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Presidential. That’s what America saw tonight. Your address to America, delivered with passion and optimism, has indeed inspired Americans to finally begin looking ahead. It’s a tough road, and you don’t know the political implications right now, but from what your campaign staffers tell you, it’s a good vibe. You just hope it carries you to victory in November." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81061, "fields": { "answer": 81059, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Wow, well that went better than expected. Despite it all, that tour was amazing really, both politically and personally. You got your policy through, really honing in on it, and you even got praise from the Arab leaders, calling out Trump on his racism. That, well that was just the gear needed to push you to the finish line to victory." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81064, "fields": { "answer": 81060, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Well, it sure is good, you get a nice bout of press for once in this election, for once. It’s a nice, stable boost for you, and helps with foreign policy a good deal. Finally, a much needed break from the campaign, especially with your time in London and Paris going great. You build cordial relations with Johnson and Macron, easing fears." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81068, "fields": { "answer": 81067, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Well, that did not go as planned, it seems like you broke into a coughing fit whilst in Seoul and the press gets its red meat for days. You feel like Hillary with all the emails and health issues. Trump mocks you on Twitter, calling you ‘the male version of Hillary.’ It almost gets under your skin." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81072, "fields": { "answer": 81071, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Your campaign think you’ve left behind a huge opportunity, but you know what you’re doing. You go from New York, to Virginia, to Florida, all in just one day. While this is happening, Trump signs the Abrahamic Accords. You’re at a stalemate once more." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81077, "fields": { "answer": 81076, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Wow, well that went better than expected. Despite it all, that tour was amazing really, both politically and personally. You got your policy through, really honing in on it, and you even got praise from the Arab leaders, calling out Trump on his racism. That, well that was just the gear needed to push you to the finish line to victory." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81081, "fields": { "answer": 81080, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Well, it sure is good, you get a nice bout of press for once in this election, for once. It’s a nice, stable boost for you, and helps with foreign policy a good deal. Finally, a much needed break from the campaign, especially with your time in London and Paris going great. You build cordial relations with Johnson and Macron, easing fears." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81085, "fields": { "answer": 81084, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Well, that did not go as planned, it seems like you broke into a coughing fit whilst in Seoul and the press gets its red meat for days. You’re at a stalemate once more." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81111, "fields": { "answer": 81110, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Wow, well that went better than expected. That, well that was just the gear needed to push you to the finish line to victory." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81115, "fields": { "answer": 81114, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Well, it sure is good, you get a nice bout of press for once in this election, for once. You build cordial relations with Johnson and Macron, easing fears." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81119, "fields": { "answer": 81118, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Well, that did not go as planned, it seems like you broke into a coughing fit whilst in Seoul and the press gets its red meat for days. You feel like Hillary with all the emails and health issues. Trump mocks you on Twitter, calling you ‘the male version of Hillary.’ It almost gets under your skin." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81123, "fields": { "answer": 81122, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Your campaign think you’ve left behind a huge opportunity, but you know what you’re doing. You go from New York, to Virginia, to Florida, all in just one day. While this is happening, Trump signs the Abrahamic Accords. You’re at a stalemate once more." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81128, "fields": { "answer": 81127, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Calm and statesman-like, just what's needed in these horribly chaotic times, good job on keeping cool and acting like the bigger man. These times call for a man who won’t pick on enemies for getting Covid. Your staffers say you’re more Presidential than ever, and you hope it helps bounce you back." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81132, "fields": { "answer": 81131, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You think its too cynical, but it works. You thought that you wouldn’t be able to touch Trump ever since his diagnosis, these are rough times, no one appreciates it, but people realise that while it is crude, you do have truth to your words." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81134, "fields": { "answer": 81133, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Your staffers look at you, horrified. This isn’t the Bernie Sanders they had supported just a few moments ago. You look like you’ve just made a massive mistake, and the media latch onto it. You feel enormous guilt, and Trump just adds to the flames." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81143, "fields": { "answer": 81142, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Calm and statesman-like, just what's needed in these horribly chaotic times, good job on keeping cool and acting like the bigger man. These times call for a man who won’t pick on enemies for getting Covid. Your staffers say you’re more Presidential than ever, and you hope it helps bounce you back." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81147, "fields": { "answer": 81146, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You think its too cynical, but it works. You thought that you wouldn’t be able to touch Trump ever since his diagnosis, these are rough times, no one appreciates it, but people realise that while it is crude, you do have truth to your words." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81151, "fields": { "answer": 81150, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Your staffers look at you, horrified. This isn’t the Bernie Sanders they had supported just a few moments ago. You look like you’ve just made a massive mistake, and the media latch onto it. You feel enormous guilt, and Trump just adds to the flames." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81156, "fields": { "answer": 81155, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Calm and statesman-like, just what's needed in these horribly chaotic times, good job on keeping cool and acting like the bigger man. Your staffers say you’re more Presidential than ever, and you hope it helps bounce you back." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81160, "fields": { "answer": 81159, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You think its too cynical, but it works. You thought that you wouldn’t be able to touch Trump ever since his diagnosis, these are rough times, no one appreciates it, but people realise that while it is crude, you do have truth to your words." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81164, "fields": { "answer": 81163, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Your staffers look at you, horrified. This isn’t the Bernie Sanders they had supported just a few moments ago. You look like you’ve just made a massive mistake, and the media latch onto it. You feel enormous guilt, and Trump just adds to the flames." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81169, "fields": { "answer": 81168, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Calm and statesman-like, just what's needed in these horribly chaotic times, good job on keeping cool and acting like the bigger man. These times call for a man who won’t pick on enemies for getting Covid. Your staffers say you’re more Presidential than ever, and you hope it helps bounce you back." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81173, "fields": { "answer": 81172, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You think its too cynical, but it works. You thought that you wouldn’t be able to touch Trump ever since his diagnosis, these are rough times, no one appreciates it, but people realise that while it is crude, you do have truth to your words." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81177, "fields": { "answer": 81176, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Your staffers look at you, horrified. This isn’t the Bernie Sanders they had supported just a few moments ago. You look like you’ve just made a massive mistake, and the media latch onto it. You feel enormous guilt, and Trump just adds to the flames." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81182, "fields": { "answer": 81181, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "With the day of campaigning over, you take a drink, a small one, and as the world fades to darkness, your're woken up by the election coverage, and you ponder into the abyss…" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81208, "fields": { "answer": 81192, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "With the day of campaigning over, you take a drink, a small one, and as the world fades to darkness, your're woken up by the election coverage, and you ponder into the abyss…" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81210, "fields": { "answer": 81209, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "With the day of campaigning over, you take a drink, a small one, and as the world fades to darkness, your're woken up by the election coverage, and you ponder into the abyss…" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81219, "fields": { "answer": 81217, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "With the day of campaigning over, you take a drink, a small one, and as the world fades to darkness, your're woken up by the election coverage, and you ponder into the abyss…" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81225, "fields": { "answer": 81224, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "And he really was gone. You couldn’t believe it at first. You soon realised the gravity of the situation. You now had the Presidency, and yet, you didn’t want it at that moment. All you could feel, was guilt. You didn’t deserve this, Donald didn’t deserve this, and yet, here you were. Once the address had ended, you shed a tear, knowing the enormous responsibilities you now have. You later call Trump’s family, extending your condolences. They thank you. Let the healing of America commence. " } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81230, "fields": { "answer": 81228, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You know what you’re doing. These ants, they’re so small, they could never beat you. Who cares if you lost South Carolina or Nevada? They’re a pitiful little band. You’ve made examples of them now. Toe the line, or be left behind." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81232, "fields": { "answer": 81229, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You show up to the first debate in Nashville, with that smug grin of yours while the rest of them duke it out for second. Losers, they don’t see the writing on the wall. You command an awesome lead over them all, who cares who came what? You’re the President. They’re not. It’s as simple as that." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81235, "fields": { "answer": 81234, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Your base, the real patriots, they can’t get enough. But the moderates, why are they fleeing? Don’t they want real change? Why do they want these neo-cons? It’s shameful. Luckily for you, your base come out in droves and swamp the vote. They said it was ‘too big to rig’. Onto the General Election." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81239, "fields": { "answer": 81238, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You can’t help but get into some arguments, but regardless, you’ve come out on top against these wimps. Why did they even try? You have them beat on every issue and yet, they still won’t join you. It doesn’t matter, the energy you now have is good enough. It’s time to fight for your *real* agenda." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81243, "fields": { "answer": 81242, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "The perfect choice for you, someone who complements your style, yet energizes the female vote, though she may have some heavy baggage, she’s just like you, someone repressed by the common enemy. You call her over the phone, asking her that all important question. She obviously says yes. It’s now your jobs to Make America Great Again." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81247, "fields": { "answer": 81246, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "The Establishment, they love it, they love Rubio. It almost makes you sick, but you have to do it, for the sake of your movement. You pick up the phone to Rubio, he sounds so smug when speaking to you. You ask him the big question. He hesitates for a moment, weighing his political career before accepting. He says yes, albeit you didn’t want him to." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81253, "fields": { "answer": 81250, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You look defeated. Out of everyone, you chose the man who refused you at the 2016 RNC. You feel disgust as you pick up the phone and call him. It goes to voicemail. “That little bastard.” You call again, he answers. “Yes, yes, of course I’ll be your VP nominee!” What a beggar." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81255, "fields": { "answer": 81254, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You fume, and pout for a few minutes. “This is completely stupid, rigged even. I hate it!” Yet you still went ahead with calling him. He answered the phone. Silence for a few seconds. “Brian, listen, do you want to be my Vice President or not?” More silence. Then… “Yes, Mr President.”" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81260, "fields": { "answer": 81259, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Bloomberg cowers. Then they fall like dominoes. They know their tricks are used up on you, and you have all the leverage. Dirty money is still money, after all. Sanders labels you as the real ‘elitist’, what a joke. He’s the real fraud, been in government for over 30 years. You joined to save your country. The contrast couldn’t be clearer." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81264, "fields": { "answer": 81263, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Four years have passed since this happened. How time flies. You use the Presidency to leverage what you can, and yet, it still comes up short. The mega fans, who adore you, give you their monthly salary. You can relate to these people, right? That’s what they think, anyways. You just love the money." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81267, "fields": { "answer": 81266, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Lines and lines of people to show up at your rock-star rallies. Outside are the stores, each with your own personal brand. To the average American, it’s greedy capitalism at its finest. But to you? It’s business. You know what you’re doing. Your people, they love you, your ideas, your brand. They can’t get enough." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81271, "fields": { "answer": 81270, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "The viral Youtube videos. The dances of YMCA. The parodies. They love it so much. Democrats claim you’re not serious, that you aren’t talking about peoples needs. Why do that when you can distract them? You’ve been doing this for decades, and a few videos doesn’t kill anyone." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81276, "fields": { "answer": 81275, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Bloomberg cowers. Then they fall like dominoes. They know their tricks are used up on you, and you have all the leverage. Dirty money is still money, after all. Sanders labels you as the real ‘elitist’, what a joke. He’s the real fraud, been in government for over 30 years. You joined to save your country. The contrast couldn’t be clearer." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81280, "fields": { "answer": 81279, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Four years have passed since this happened. How time flies. You use the Presidency to leverage what you can, and yet, it still comes up short. The mega fans, who adore you, give you their monthly salary. You can relate to these people, right? That’s what they think, anyways. You just love the money." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81283, "fields": { "answer": 81282, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Lines and lines of people to show up at your rock-star rallies. Your people, they love you, your ideas, your brand. They can’t get enough." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81287, "fields": { "answer": 81286, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "The viral Youtube videos. The dances of YMCA. That’s what they think, anyways. You just love the money." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81315, "fields": { "answer": 81314, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Lines and lines of people to show up at your rock-star rallies. Outside are the stores, each with your own personal brand. To the average American, it’s greedy capitalism at its finest. But to you? It’s business. You know what you’re doing. Your people, they love you, your ideas, your brand. They can’t get enough." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81319, "fields": { "answer": 81318, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "The viral Youtube videos. The dances of YMCA. The parodies. They love it so much. Democrats claim you’re not serious, that you aren’t talking about peoples needs. Why do that when you can distract them? You’ve been doing this for decades, and a few videos doesn’t kill anyone." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81324, "fields": { "answer": 81323, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "They go. It doesn’t go well, to say the least. You hold your head in your hands as the press conference goes about as well as you can expect. At least your base, who love you so much, are riled up. You’re going to need them come November." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81327, "fields": { "answer": 81325, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "This caused its intended effect. The so-called ‘RADICAL LEFT’ are furious, wanting you removed from office for ‘Abuse of Power’. The Democrats are too cowardly to do it, you think they’re going to lose. No pushback from any of them. This was almost too easy." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81332, "fields": { "answer": 81330, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "The carnage, the flames, the anger. All shown on display. You know full well what you’re doing, but you’ve only just started. Soon, from coast to coast, people begin to see the truth. You label them as a ‘terrorist organisation’. That one doesn’t go down so well, but still, a net positive." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81335, "fields": { "answer": 81333, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You go live, swarmed by advisors, however one notable person is missing…the current Vice President. “Listen, Sanders won’t be joining us, okay? He doesn’t want to talk!”. You know full well he wasn’t invited, out of spite. The speech goes well enough, however your base seem deflated." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81342, "fields": { "answer": 81341, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "They go. It doesn’t go well, to say the least. You hold your head in your hands as the press conference goes about as well as you can expect. At least your base, who love you so much, are riled up. The so-called ‘RADICAL LEFT’ are furious, wanting you removed from office for ‘Abuse of Power’. The Democrats are too cowardly to do it, you think they’re going to lose. No pushback from any of them. This was almost too easy." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81384, "fields": { "answer": 81383, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Do we really need to do anything? I mean, the ads write themselves. “RADICAL LEFT TAKE OVER CITIES.”, it’s a blessing, truly it is! These people have no idea, they’re going to be so shocked, it’ll be beautiful. Democrats won’t know what to do, especially Crazy Bernie!" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81387, "fields": { "answer": 81386, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You go live, swarmed by advisors, however one notable person is missing…the current Vice President. “Listen, Sanders won’t be joining us, okay? He doesn’t want to talk!”. You know full well he wasn’t invited, out of spite. The speech goes well enough, however your base seem deflated." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81393, "fields": { "answer": 81392, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "The rank and file love him, and you admire him. You always pay back loyalty. That’s what you’ve done with Huckabee. A real man, one who once inspired legions of GOP members, now in a bygone era. But you, and only you, can revive it. He’s just the start. Make America Great Again." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81397, "fields": { "answer": 81396, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "The base, they clap like seals. They love him, his presence absorbing the crowd all around him. He can’t take enough, quite evidently. Still, he gives a rousing speech to the GOP, and rallies them to your cause. He’s just the start. Make America Great Again." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81401, "fields": { "answer": 81400, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Your numbers with African-Americans shoot through the roof, according to Rasmussen Polls, anyway. His quiet persona, his back-seat approach doesn’t get the crowd roaring, but it’s a small teaser for the real deal. He’s just the start. Make America Great Again." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81411, "fields": { "answer": 81410, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You electrify the stage. The energy, the people, they love you. You can’t help but let out a grin that consumes the RNC. Victory is upon you. The Democranks, Crazy Bernard, they have no idea what’s going to happen. You are just the start. It feels like you’re at ‘home’. Time will only prove whether or not you’re right, but for now, rejoice in the attention. They love it, and you love it, it’s a win-win." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81493, "fields": { "answer": 81492, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "The rural folk, they finally get what they’ve wanted - attention. For too long, they’ve been abandoned by politicians, but not by Donald J Trump. They clap for you, they cheer your name, they cheer MAGA. It doesn’t matter about the crowd sizes, it’s all relative, or at least that’s what staffers say." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81497, "fields": { "answer": 81496, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You can almost hear Stacey Abrams crying out in Georgia, claiming how it was ‘rigged’ against her. What a sore loser. You know you aren’t a sore loser. You’re a winner. Your people, they love it, hopefully they don’t get tired of you winning so much. Staffers panic, why? You’re doing the Lord’s work down South." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81502, "fields": { "answer": 81501, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Your people, your fans, they can’t believe it. What happened? Why isn’t their savior trying to save America? They feel hopeless, and yet you know what’s going to happen. The Democrats will fall at any moment, they just have to be patient. You see the grand plan. America First!” Your crowds, dwindling by the day, still chant this line. The moderates? Who needed them anyways, everyone knows it, they’re total losers, right? Bernard Sanders will take whatever credit with Fauci. You don’t need it, frauds." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81577, "fields": { "answer": 81573, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "The hawks in the economy, they love it, “Money well spent.” they said. The Democrats, they cry out in horror, calling you Donald Scrooge. You can’t help but laugh. Is that the best they can do? You later post yourself as Scrooge on Twitter, and your staffers, they say you ‘owned the libs’, whatever that means." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81581, "fields": { "answer": 81580, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You know what you’re doing. The hawks, they’ll shriek, but since when have you listened to their opinions? You’re a businessman, you know what you’re doing. This is just the beginning of your re-election campaign. Bernard can try and take credit all he wants, but people know who did this. Donald John Trump. The Savior." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81585, "fields": { "answer": 81584, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "The public, they’re amazed, they’re saying how you’re so Presidential. How come they didn’t see it before? Sanders sulks and pouts, continuing to take heat from “Progressives” about how he’s not standing up to tyranny. What a joke. Democrats have fallen so far behind." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81590, "fields": { "answer": 81589, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "“America First! Democrats have fallen so far behind." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81641, "fields": { "answer": 81640, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Donald nods. \"I agree, totally, these phonies will pay.\" He almost sounds resolute in the face of the so-called 'UNIPARTY'. However, it is all for naught. Trump, as much as he resonates with the idea, sticks to being a Republican, fearing his chances for 2020. Regardless, this sends a ripple throughout Washington, not since Washington has there been an independent in the Executive, and there's a reason for that. You and Donald are now stuck in a precarious situation." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81645, "fields": { "answer": 81644, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "He thinks it through, you hate it. Your job depended on this one man's decision. You wait, and wait...and wait. Until he gives you a call. \"Bernie, you can stay. But don't undermine me again, otherwise, well, you'll see!\" You hang up. It sends a shiver down your spine, but what else could you do?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81649, "fields": { "answer": 81648, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You and Donald have a frank discussion. It can’t happen. While you both want to ‘stick it’ to the Establishment, neither you or Donald are committed to it, knowing your political careers would sink before they even started again. You give up on the third party idea." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81688, "fields": { "answer": 81687, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You're both content with this, what needs to change? While congressional relations are poor, you both represent wings of the parties which can get some minor legislative achievements under your belts. You also have 2 out of 3 branches of government somewhat under control. Well, not Trump, but that's okay." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81692, "fields": { "answer": 81691, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You know what you represent. The billionaire class, the wealthy in Manhattan. But they don’t see that, they see you as a champion for the Working Class in the coal mines. Those are the people you really relate too. We’re making it great again. Can’t they see?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81700, "fields": { "answer": 81697, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Congratulations, you’ve just destroyed whatever relationship you’ve had with New Yorkers. You don’t care, they never liked you anyways. You represent the real America, not the frauds in Manhattan. It’s time to get to work." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81703, "fields": { "answer": 81702, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "“Crazy Bernard”, “Demented Sanders”, “Lunatic Bernie”. They just roll off the tongue, and you know your base will continue to clap for you. They cheer you, your victories against Sanders, and yet, it feels somewhat empty. Why did he have to leave? Why couldn’t he just stay?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81708, "fields": { "answer": 81707, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You have so many accomplishments, so many, and yet, the media, they don’t cover them? Are they deluded? Why are they in bed with Sanders? Did the Democrooks bail him out again? What a sad state of affairs. You know your worth, they can all rot in their despair." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81712, "fields": { "answer": 81711, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "The suburbanites, they fall for it. They flee towards you, fearing that their 401K will be totally useless from a Sanders administration. Who cares if the poor want healthcare? Their money matters more than their lives. Victory is within your grasp, and better yet, Sanders still stumbles over figures. What a joke. You almost pity him." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81718, "fields": { "answer": 81717, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "The campaign has entered the gutter. You feel proud, but so many people, can’t they see? They call you out. Why? You’re exposing the deep state." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81724, "fields": { "answer": 81723, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "“Crazy Bernard”, “Demented Sanders”, “Lunatic Bernie”. You almost pity him." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81781, "fields": { "answer": 81780, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "The campaign has entered the gutter. You feel proud, but so many people, can’t they see? They call you out. Why? You’re exposing the deep state." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81787, "fields": { "answer": 81786, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "There’s no chance that Bernie is willing to compromise. Why would he? That fraud. He doesn’t see the landslide you see. Victory is imminent, you just have to be patient. Bernie can delay and delay as much as he wants, but the inevitable will still happen. You nominate Amy Coney Barrett, she gives you a sick smile." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81791, "fields": { "answer": 81790, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You felt like you won, but your energy, it wasn’t there, not at the beginning. Your base, they call you ‘based’ and a ‘chad’. What? Anyways, the so-called moderates flee in droves, they couldn’t stand your performance. How? You did so well, they just don’t see it." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81795, "fields": { "answer": 81794, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You, your energy, it just wasn’t there. Thank the Lord that Sanders was incapable of finding his composure either. What a sham. People say it was a draw. Impossible, you won, you know you won, and yet, deep down, you feel like they’re right. How could this happen?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81800, "fields": { "answer": 81799, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Victory feels good, doesn’t it? Sanders couldn’t handle the pressure, the noise, your zingers. What happened to him? What a loser. Floundering live in front of millions of Americans. The people, your people, they see it for what it is. A complete and total victory for TRUMP. The ratings, the ones you crave, finally come." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81805, "fields": { "answer": 81804, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You showed up in spirit. Well, the public couldn’t see it, but you were there, while Sanders fought a so-called ‘empty’ podium. You say scheduling conflict, they say coward. Everyone knows you, you’re right, but people believe the fake news. What’s going on anymore?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81811, "fields": { "answer": 81810, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You go to Israel, meeting with Ben. You can’t stand him, but you have to remain composed. Arab leaders soon join you, and next to the Wall, you sign the Abrahamic Accords. A huge deal for both the USA and Israel. You just hope it boosts your chances come November." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81816, "fields": { "answer": 81815, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Merkel. Johnson. Macron. All line up, wanting your attention, your ego. They know who the real boss is, they know who controls the levers of power. What do they have to fear? It’s not as if you’re about to leave. One by one, they kiss the ring, and American hegemony stays in Europe." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81820, "fields": { "answer": 81819, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Your advisors feel like you wasted a golden opportunity. What opportunity? To spend a few nights with people below you? What a joke. You dominate from state to state, and yet, Sanders calls you a coward for dodging meetings. Why does he care? He’s not been involved in months. The campaign continues to descend into the pits of hell." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81822, "fields": { "answer": 81821, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You, Abe and Morrison all sit next to one another, talking about countering the Chinese. They can’t do it without you, they bend to whatever you wish. Is life really this easy for you? XI Jinping secretly admires you, he knows it, why won’t he say it? He can’t be embarrassed about loving TRUMP." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81830, "fields": { "answer": 81829, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You go to Israel, meeting with Ben. You can’t stand him, but you have to remain composed. Arab leaders soon join you, and next to the Wall, you sign the Abrahamic Accords. A huge deal for both the USA and Israel. Trump, businessman, reality star, family man, and the 45th President of the United States, is officially dead. More to come shortly." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81889, "fields": { "answer": 81888, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "They’re ecstatic you continue to hold your breathtaking rallies. They can’t get enough, and they cheer your name. Not your VP. Not the party. But your name. You feel joy, and yet, you stumble. The coughing fits don’t help, but questions start to arise. Your staffers pretend it doesn’t exist. You are the fittest, after all." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81917, "fields": { "answer": 81892, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "While not as authentic, it works like a charm. The people, your people, they love it. They admire it. Your strength, they say you’re the fittest, the strongest, no one can top you, especially Crazy Bernard. It feels like being handed victory on a silver platter." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81922, "fields": { "answer": 81921, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "The crowds, the roars, you miss them, and they miss you, but it’s for the better. Your health, already the best, begins to improve, and you soon are out back on the trail after a week. Sanders, ever political, uses it to gain momentum. Your health, already the best, begins to improve, and you soon are out back on the trail after a week. Sanders, ever political, uses it to gain momentum. Coward." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81984, "fields": { "answer": 81983, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Bernie Sanders now assumes the Presidency. You wish it was you, but how could this happen? The savior of the Republican Party, gone, just like that. You feel deep sadness at his departure, but you are more determined than ever to fight for what he believed in. His base, they fume, they think you or Sanders did it, but the vast majority stand behind you. Godspeed." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81989, "fields": { "answer": 81988, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Bernie Sanders now assumes the Presidency. You wish it was you, but how could this happen? The savior of the Republican Party, gone, just like that. You feel deep sadness at his departure, but you are more determined than ever to fight for what he believed in. His base, they fume, they think you or Sanders did it, but the vast majority stand behind you. Godspeed." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81994, "fields": { "answer": 81993, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Bernie Sanders now assumes the Presidency. You wish it was you, but how could this happen? The savior of the Republican Party, gone, just like that. You feel deep sadness at his departure, but you are more determined than ever to fight for what he believed in. His base, they fume, they think you or Sanders did it, but the vast majority stand behind you. Godspeed." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 81999, "fields": { "answer": 81998, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Bernie Sanders now assumes the Presidency. You wish it was you, but how could this happen? The savior of the Republican Party, gone, just like that. You feel deep sadness at his departure, but you are more determined than ever to fight for what he believed in. His base, they fume, they think you or Sanders did it, but the vast majority stand behind you. Godspeed." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 82007, "fields": { "answer": 82003, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "It seems like Ohio and Iowa can easily fall down your aisle if you push hard enough, and if you lucky, you could win Pennsylvania too, but the Midwest is a quite tough thing to crack, with the blue wall stronger than ever." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 82012, "fields": { "answer": 82008, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "If the South is shaky, pray tell what will happen in the Midwest, but anyways, your margins in the key states of Texas, Georgia, Florida and North Carolina have shifted more towards your aisle, pray tell what will happen next, good luck." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 82014, "fields": { "answer": 82013, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "A little ambitious with Illinois, but the Industrial Midwest is an important flank you need to have if you want to even think about winning. Remember, this isn’t 2000." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 82020, "fields": { "answer": 82019, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "A calm and statesman-like response, odd for you of all people, oh well, anyways it seems like a small nationwide bump has come from this ad campaign." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 82245, "fields": { "answer": 82173, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "As you wake up to see the results, it baffles you. America put trust in you and Bernie, but mostly in you, of course. 52 seats in the House of Representatives, and 6 Senate seats (Ohio, West Virginia, Missouri, North Dakota, Montana and Wyoming!) Both you and Bernie are ecstatic, and feel confident heading into the new year. Maybe change can happen after all?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 82257, "fields": { "answer": 82256, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Donald nods in agreement. He's almost excited to bring that energy back after holding back for so long. You feel that energy as well, and you are out for retribution. You felt betrayed by Angus, but now, you feel free to go after them both. Romney would be a piece of cake against you. Mormon bastard." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 82310, "fields": { "answer": 82309, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "When history looks back at this moment, it will shed a tear. We both tried, at the very least, but it was never meant to happen. Thank you for at least being gracious." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 82366, "fields": { "answer": 82365, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You feel alive as you say this. Romney is a sore loser, and he whines constantly and constantly. Finally, it lands on you to put the 'nail in the coffin' for their campaign, but not in your usual way. You plaster state to state with positive messaging of your proposals, and paint Mitt as some glum figure. You feel euphoric as you tear him apart, rhetorically, of course." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 82402, "fields": { "answer": 82401, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "\"THE UNIPARTY!\" Donald says, \"We have to win Bernie, for OUR people.\" You nod in agreement, you can finally call Donald a 'friend'. You feel as if those backstabbers in Congress are trying to have you removed, to tear you down. You won't have it. You are in the way, and there is nothing they can do." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 85056, "fields": { "answer": 85055, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "If these weak republicans want to keep challenging you, so be it. The results won’t change. “Kasich, how pathetic. He looks like a slob, so awkward standing there next to Bloomberg. I’d like to beat him this time in Ohio, that way, he’ll be a loser in every state in the country!” You continue ranting as you relish the chance for total victory." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 85093, "fields": { "answer": 85092, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "“It’s incredible how, you know, these Manhattan guys, they pretend to be your friend, they golf with you, they eat steak at your restaurant, a one of a kind restaurant really, and then as soon as you’ve got something they want, friendship’s over!” Bernie doesn’t get it, but he doesn’t need to. For you, this is personal." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 85130, "fields": { "answer": 85129, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "“It’s not enough to own half the damn city. He wants to own the political process!” Bernie says. There’s real venom in his words. He loves talking about money in politics, and you aren’t about to stop him. You and Bernie both do your best campaigning when you’re pissed off." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 88002, "fields": { "answer": 88001, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Donald gives you a look. “Are you insane Bernie? These people will gut us, we can’t give an inch, otherwise they’ll take a mile!”. Perhaps he’s right, but you call Clinton and Booker. As Donald expected, they refused, much to your dismay. You can tell that any bridges you once had were burned long ago once you left Hillary behind." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 88153, "fields": { "answer": 88152, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You know what you’re doing, dividing and conquering, and it makes you feel guilty, but you have to do it to secure your legacy. Donald calls Hillary a ‘power-hungry woman seeking revenge’, and you know deep down, he’s right, but you can’t stomach it. Scott, on the other hand, well, you don’t need to do much, he isn’t exactly a behemoth." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 88304, "fields": { "answer": 88303, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Donald gives you one of those disgruntled looks he usually has with the media. “Bernie, we can’t have nice things with these people. The media, I mean, they’ll crush us”. And so it begins, you both have your different strategies, and it just confuses America. They begin to wonder, who’s running the country?" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 88458, "fields": { "answer": 88457, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Trump's words echo within your head. You have to win this. You prepare like hell, and you spend a few nights away from the Campaign Trail to recuperate and face against Romney. It pays off. You win, supposedly 'BIG LEAGUE' according to Trump. The tables are beginning to turn." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 88461, "fields": { "answer": 88460, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Falter you did. It felt weak, your performance against Romney was disastrous. You still have time to recuperate, but Trump isn't pleased. \"You win some, you lose some, I suppose, not me though, I always win BIG!\" You feel detached after he said that. Still, you push on like the proud progressive you always have been." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 88464, "fields": { "answer": 88463, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "It worked. Romney faltered, and ultimately, cost them the debate, but not by much. You had many of your own gaffes, including suggesting a more softer approach to Cuba. Donald didn't like that, but what could he do? It was your debate. This won't shift the balance of power much, unfortunately." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 88467, "fields": { "answer": 88466, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Disaster struck. What happened? You went from gaffe to gaffe, and ended up making yourself an idiot and Donald even more so. He was fuming. He didn't speak to you for a few days after that, and the 'MEDIA' was all over it. This will dominate your campaign for a few days." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 88471, "fields": { "answer": 88470, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Trump's words echo within your head. You have to win this. You prepare like hell, and you spend a few nights away from the Campaign Trail to recuperate and face against Kasich. It pays off. You win, supposedly 'BIG LEAGUE' according to Trump. You have to win this. You prepare like hell, and you spend a few nights away from the Campaign Trail to recuperate and face against the uniparty. It pays off. The tables are beginning to turn." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 88487, "fields": { "answer": 88486, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Falter you did. It felt weak, your performance against the establishment was disastrous. You still have time to recuperate, but Trump isn't pleased. \"You win some, you lose some, I suppose, not me though, I always win BIG!\" You feel detached after he said that. Still, you push on like the proud progressive you always have been." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 88490, "fields": { "answer": 88489, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "It worked. The establishment faltered, and ultimately, cost them the debate, but not by much. You had many of your own gaffes, including suggesting a more softer approach to Cuba. Donald didn't like that, but what could he do? It was your debate. This won't shift the balance of power much, unfortunately." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 88493, "fields": { "answer": 88492, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "Disaster struck. What happened? You went from gaffe to gaffe, and ended up making yourself an idiot and Donald even more so. He was fuming. He didn't speak to you for a few days after that, and the 'MEDIA' was all over it. This will dominate your campaign for a few days." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 88502, "fields": { "answer": 88501, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "A ‘fallout of the ages’ they're calling it. You see it as a joke, Bernard does too. Why do we have to take them seriously? For once, you feel like you can be restrained as these idiots make fools of themselves. Rally to rally, state to state, people still say: \"MAKE. AMERICA. GREAT. AGAIN.\"" } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 88645, "fields": { "answer": 88644, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You pile attack after attack, pummelling them into the ground. They try and fight back, saying you and Bernie are 'extremists' and a 'threat to the American way of life', and you don't care. They're a has-been and a never-will-be. Bernie continues with his own messaging to pump out his own positive messaging, with your discretion of course." } }, { "model": "campaign_trail.answer_feedback", "pk": 88788, "fields": { "answer": 88787, "candidate": 301, "answer_feedback": "You can finally step away from the trail, not having to prove yourself any longer. You see them tick up poll by poll, but you have the 'Trump factor'. You know people will still vote for you, and you feel content. Bernie panics though, and he frantically goes from state to state. You tell him not to worry, but he doesn't buy it." } } ]; campaignTrail_temp.cyoa = true; let _questionIdxByPk = null; function _rebuildQuestionIdxMap() { _questionIdxByPk = new Map(); const arr = campaignTrail_temp.questions_json; for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) { _questionIdxByPk.set(Number(arr[i].pk), i); } } function getQuestionIndexFromPk(pk) { const n = Number(pk); if (!_questionIdxByPk) _rebuildQuestionIdxMap(); let idx = _questionIdxByPk.get(n); // if map is stale, rebuild once if (idx == null || campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[idx]?.pk !== n) { _rebuildQuestionIdxMap(); idx = _questionIdxByPk.get(n); } return idx ?? -1; } function getJumpIndexFromPk(pk) { const idx = getQuestionIndexFromPk(pk); return idx >= 0 ? idx - 1 : -1; } function getQuestionNumberFromPk(pk) { return getJumpIndexFromPk(pk); } function tunnel(new_q){ return e.questions_json[e.questions_json.map(f=>f.pk).indexOf(new_q)]; } function questionSwapper(pk1, pk2) { const questionData = campaignTrail_temp.questions_json; // find indices of the questions const index1 = getQuestionIndexFromPk(pk1); const index2 = getQuestionIndexFromPk(pk2); // validate both questions exist if (index1 === -1 || index2 === -1) { console.warn(`questionSwapper: Could not find question(s) with pk ${pk1} and/or ${pk2}`); return false; } // swap the entire question objects [questionData[index1], questionData[index2]] = [questionData[index2], questionData[index1]]; // rebuild the index map since positions changed _rebuildQuestionIdxMap(); return true; } function answerSwapper(pk1, pk2, takeEffects = true) { // hardcoded JSON data for answers const answerData = campaignTrail_temp.answers_json; // find the indices of the objects with the specified PKs const index1 = answerData.findIndex(item => item.pk === pk1); const index2 = answerData.findIndex(item => item.pk === pk2); // check if objects with those PKs exist if (index1 === -1 || index2 === -1) { return; } // swap the question values const tempQuestion = answerData[index1].fields.question; answerData[index1].fields.question = answerData[index2].fields.question; answerData[index2].fields.question = tempQuestion; // if takeEffects is true, answers swap effects also if (takeEffects) { const otherJsons = [ campaignTrail_temp.answer_score_global_json, campaignTrail_temp.answer_score_issue_json, campaignTrail_temp.answer_score_state_json ]; otherJsons.forEach(jsonData => { jsonData.forEach(item => { if (item.fields.answer === pk1) { item.fields.answer = pk2; } }); }); } } window.opLast = 'the Uniparty'; window.opName = 'The Uniparty'; // This updates the candidate banner logos. let imgUrl = "https://file.garden/aSGPS63bXFoDhPjg/Untitled345_20251122172811.png"; background-size: cover; background-position: center; border-color: #c9c9c9; border-width: .01em; width: 287px; height: 105px; margin-left: -0.07em; font-size: 0; } `; } // initial render updateStyling(imgUrl); (-7)`, "-8": `Trump is a Nazi.. (-7)`, "-7": `Trump is somewhere to the right of Pat Buchanan and the left of Adolf Hitler. (-7)`, "-6": `Trump is taking notes from 4chan.
